name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkr91dmjg47cp43p32jptm8vgro99e790qd65el8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb6svb9m4avg8uaakbslh8ekh2djdoful150k88o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zot5bij5aq5k4lkpea4hrqu4cp4u2j0ls2bg80v8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpib1og7anngd3a0no15dqdltapf9f23u0mrg86g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjjv463h8iil88c6kpl16u2d086oq1pohskvnku8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6182arvmj21aqj0p5lconu0qcghcu61efjhcgbg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi1d3q9kra70ctu8m8e97i5v8u5onmpvsun7sro8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr6htb8np9o8cjblste6k2qoemm7jgfed5lbi5n0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "KOM Signature")
---

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn0ueegfa05855jpfbkep0e1ft90hm91jgsghff0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6cor2chh2bs "DONATE NOW")

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te05af2c3-a803-45c7-944d-d7e94424b729/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Moving up in the polls
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsQyNk_DNO

Vivek 2024

The latest Fox News poll has us in third place, ahead of
Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osQyNk_DNO

Fellow American - did you see
this polling from Fox News?

🚨 We're polling in third
place, ahead of Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley! 🚨

Fellow American, are you feeling
the Ramaswamy TSUNAMI?

Polling numbers like this are KEY
to securing a prime spot on the debate stage.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY
DAY meeting with voters, but I could really use your help in
securing new donors before the day is over.

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $15 ➔

Chip in $25 ➔

Chip in $50 ➔

Chip in More ➔

We cannot afford to let the
recent polling momentum we've built peter out. Please help before
midnight!

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isQyNk_DNO

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osQyNk_DNO

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7gj6drju4964cdfk9fib9g7fs3sqd1eri71urm0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rl0lpli5ohv6u5dqs4k3nekktienjb7c3pv37g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8d8tfk0b29dmgs281op7hqfe0f9b5d76r5jotu0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs8qv75htumi7od9q2ngsku9lidvg5spbj2e2rg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8it8pe9oooe1tidan4gnduvek05g0j9ghnjemm8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhas5rq8dhjmcih7jkt2485fv9qaqne5msittgu0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za795obg90t2762u7strlfh9frljt1u181phvano_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztukj69fq3paa5db71d4rkvd3atd4h6jqics4r60_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1h6eoj3cph2bs)
---

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvjaabrqkusmg0d8o085l6hu7p16m8g6ur6k5kj8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zimufn5ajc91fqu7eul1fpscovd8ffkus9rb18no_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv3fo34393ogec89ef1qb7f4ocm8o486o3802hqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znr2aacn13h0qkq77kf8al3aljqqj47ajrn5nsio_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35p0qum9lp5ljbntell696qevlsu78iu6urtk6g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrqo9gslsja9vtoni574v4vfk9pvncb7b7k3mpso_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z258lardfuj9jqb46nuo6htigjqobvicfr3rm5mo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vatmggj4ua5o36p1n4lr8sf45n6nmadj3l7voo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j64or4cph2bs)
---

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Time is of the essence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Every single minute could be the difference between success and failure

| | |
---
Friend, If there's one thing I've learned on the battlefield, it's the **value of time.**
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0097c993473a444c89e0766e92d404ec&_e=X5zRsBzoSfj_AePoEaK7QOAMtYCTUOw7lQCFgqyDIxY4uLBR0W1TpFZZYWQDDjaxGTuxkymxs0YK-UbQO16bm3euFatvUapiG3Akxo4XVPIHchx4UlokOkhq6ibMrxierSpaPmvty52L4kkar0Cpec7Afa-36Hy3F0C99NjASRaw1ZmMQO9fSVPKLmdA67FFanfrWT37cYMzUfZsCOO2YA5XWqgDwgKGj6O6bDp11E69Fe36WD4ZazMuoI-Kb3r_SnlgqgCJB8wZwJt0cNwbORzg_DWXT-HtPY-17N3BX4m9v7xB3V8AJI5mcgospshH0G7jO4mWa81q1a2YQUp_uUur0_mh_t5xt_XCRi6sQnC7yx-hLDQvQB6-w57DvSsMSlPqwGFb8D0F-g5acR3GTsPDJjQlE-VVnwikkSYIE_asM6F2KPXKvUdrzdk_nqnoeQEigtr9J7yE5Xl-_qTkvw%3D%3D)
---
Timing is everything. In combat, it can be the difference between victory and defeat - between life and death. **Timing is everything in elections too.** Let me explain: Early fundraising is **CRUCIAL** to a strong campaign. Everything we do, from winning votes at the doors to putting out ads on TV costs money. Campaigns aren't cheap, Friend, especially this highly competitive campaign for Nevada's Senate seat. My opponent has already started out with a multimillion-dollar war chest and she's enlisted the help of her left-wing D.C. friends like Hillary Clinton VP pick Tim Kaine. If I want to compete against her, I have no time to waste. That's why I'm asking you, Friend. **[Can you please chip in anything you can to help me fight back against the D.C. establishment?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0097c993473a444c89e0766e92d404ec&_e=X5zRsBzoSfj_AePoEaK7QOAMtYCTUOw7lQCFgqyDIxY4uLBR0W1TpFZZYWQDDjaxGTuxkymxs0YK-UbQO16bm3euFatvUapiG3Akxo4XVPIHchx4UlokOkhq6ibMrxierSpaPmvty52L4kkar0Cpec7Afa-36Hy3F0C99NjASRaw1ZmMQO9fSVPKLmdA67FFanfrWT37cYMzUfZsCOO2YA5XWqgDwgKGj6O6bDp11E69Fe36WD4ZazMuoI-Kb3r_SnlgqgCJB8wZwJt0cNwbORzg_DWXT-HtPY-17N3BX4m9v7xB3V8AJI5mcgospshHDGIuqjcJyycOv3H5Tq9TlfvjPX4y_krO73XxLVwUTtyGhDfDsAx0WPbSTxF6hMxaM5a3pvyhQO2lMGQdXHtbAB07CBwk8LLrtL-bM2qu4tkzTY49JBGsBkiOqxVLxoRNpZYqdKHkOS5BxgUN8agsjg%3D%3D)** I knew from the get-go that this would be tough, but nothing worthwhile ever comes easy. Can I count on you to have my back? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown U.S. Army (Ret.)
---

If I want to compete against her, I have no time to waste. That's why I'm asking you, Friend. I knew from the get-go that this would be tough, but nothing worthwhile ever comes easy. Can I count on you to have my back? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown U.S. Army (Ret.) | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: I’m sorry, but we can’t go on like this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, _Our schools are failing parents and students._ _Our economy is tanking._ _Our money is worth less and everything costs more._ _Our southern border is an invasion zone._ _Our brave policemen are being overrun by violent crime in cities across the country._ _Our politicians forget about their constituents._ Americans can't take another 6 years of this. **[I cannot, I WILL NOT stand idly by.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99d8fddd58d24cf5aa4a86bb30856ce6&_e=LC3Y4rnd1N8yf11E7zWZKEm0U_5dOasCYC1r74BkHVbSvdHLn1iTOxiXNlozjrfl0SnYN2_rKrlfZj_A6TGOEbflAPP2WACEn29gIk3clquvChCqbeS6uP6MIFC1dtXjg6FTYodxW-y9T9UtqY_-v4CVDwRXqfDGbb5k8HKgzc26Dwawn6wxOt8ehqSSSEADzPmOkCurlX6luVAUflsjy4okHnzYlceSXRofSfnxbBsOCe2ql-OMmEgJ7vqUyrPYCXBV5ARkhf1-5rI2kczjrutJLxTFgTCbaYY8Lcctl80F9Bi8yMdTzMok4POleV_P5POGumol2t26iEVZy-Xtn6CpZnsJ05TLya_ztp1Zeci8XGRGDDzD1BaFRVCjGejB0iMoAwC7Dv1uNxe0QDDw9cyi69iAbHSXGjyK5MrtB2qz2DQ4gK-O99WxAshIWaInh-Slpa_fNe4KZO9OeCRqTQ%3D%3D)** My name is Sam Brown. I'm an Army Captain, Purple Heart recipient, small business owner, and proud husband and father. _**[I'm running for U.S. Senate in the most competitive Senate race in the country.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99d8fddd58d24cf5aa4a86bb30856ce6&_e=LC3Y4rnd1N8yf11E7zWZKEm0U_5dOasCYC1r74BkHVbSvdHLn1iTOxiXNlozjrfl0SnYN2_rKrlfZj_A6TGOEbflAPP2WACEn29gIk3clquvChCqbeS6uP6MIFC1dtXjg6FTYodxW-y9T9UtqY_-v4CVDwRXqfDGbb5k8HKgzc26Dwawn6wxOt8ehqSSSEADzPmOkCurlX6luVAUflsjy4okHnzYlceSXRofSfnxbBsOCe2ql-OMmEgJ7vqUyrPYCXBV5ARkhf1-5rI2kczjrutJLxTFgTCbaYY8Lcctl80F9Bi8yMdTzMok4POleV_P_XQx3IiICAdyRNwNzvO71ZGgh4XMs-OZf4G6MSDLbmo44vsHkPiPAM3vQ4OrI1O3Kx2Iml5Z42JioRf39IG5JlfS5zJ4m1XTUjGjtrPzzj5hUubBSJxCzpOLIAXd18OGm5LQ2d1FYjPfkKgBDD_JcQ%3D%3D)**_ My entire life has been a series of missions. Missions that I've gladly taken in service to my God and my country. **[My next mission is one that calls me to serve my country in the U.S. Senate. Will you help me continue my mission?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99d8fddd58d24cf5aa4a86bb30856ce6&_e=LC3Y4rnd1N8yf11E7zWZKEm0U_5dOasCYC1r74BkHVbSvdHLn1iTOxiXNlozjrfl0SnYN2_rKrlfZj_A6TGOEbflAPP2WACEn29gIk3clquvChCqbeS6uP6MIFC1dtXjg6FTYodxW-y9T9UtqY_-v4CVDwRXqfDGbb5k8HKgzc26Dwawn6wxOt8ehqSSSEADzPmOkCurlX6luVAUflsjy4okHnzYlceSXRofSfnxbBsOCe2ql-OMmEgJ7vqUyrPYCXBV5ARkhf1-5rI2kczjrutJLxTFgTCbaYY8Lcctl80F9Bi8yMdTzMok4POleV_Pkn9JISHYU09jLsnJDK5X4RuUxrozEhKLO02FisXVCC-de4BrV_zAlqdiLlmUdS_buuIpPyUa0zak5_YAFQ-INlYTdztHozdbAUvKz7kFX0aXeMju3oZr0lj7Qpb4fNWfPJYWzt--b7Ch8KRlEsDIIw%3D%3D)**

[**SEND IN SAM**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=99d8fddd58d24cf5aa4a86bb30856ce6&_e=LC3Y4rnd1N8yf11E7zWZKEm0U_5dOasCYC1r74BkHVbSvdHLn1iTOxiXNlozjrfl0SnYN2_rKrlfZj_A6TGOEbflAPP2WACEn29gIk3clquvChCqbeS6uP6MIFC1dtXjg6FTYodxW-y9T9UtqY_-v4CVDwRXqfDGbb5k8HKgzc26Dwawn6wxOt8ehqSSSEADzPmOkCurlX6luVAUflsjy4okHnzYlceSXRofSfnxbBsOCe2ql-OMmEgJ7vqUyrPYCXBV5ARkhf1-5rI2kczjrutJLxTFgTCbaYY8Lcctl80F9Bi8yMdTzMok4POleV_PqJLeNYxGQ1PWs84pCsKGuvgZym5MP3HAuzUg6gdKsuVuUx8l_zGR_czKI3jVUypFHjxLlFQwmKNgWrFMQt4ABNL5cXTX-_PZAQUWBlIoapd2MAfXYv5tPTDy5YXQjZu6UFl8nI5uGSMVfM_dELKT1w%3D%3D)

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: Sending you this email gives me no pleasure.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Sending you this message gives me no pleasure, Friend, I'm not excited to tell you that our country is being run into the ground by coastal elites like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.
I'm not excited to put yet another political message in your inbox. But if I'm going to make it to Washington and defeat an establishment Democrat who is nothing but a rubber stamp for Joe Biden, then I have to do everything in my power to rally patriotic Americans across the country to win! Friend, my name is Sam Brown. That's me in the pictures.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f27c46408cb84a64aa231caca0d75232&_e=YCtz4VevaCqJWExnx7aqgl144v8l01rWYTWsbwlBehScZbDsrVYHIqYPCVbIp0aRzhQZoxFB1kiA1oaTwBzMd8yjXA8h0QE1qoxvqbPnhNgjWGNHUyyxXtk6zL6q6c4WdnwF0wldLqIl8xL41R-M9Qb0Lt2-T72O8D29XTHpl0o3_pzpwU71S-SGeA47vlfPAUuBLwfeTVneRNZtcs_B5tBBk74mkrdIMerXvi_zL20iehptvRVcnOPF0yYLZmUQIfocmpzdHHu0__38R3ML6F3oItvB3s5KJY1kyRnQV-asrjIgTwhluE-f2NSDuX-dFC1NwRvY7UfnraM5dfydU-n0Uvexj0SMqdakoJKdWcxmM0ZYZPcICfW_704CfLz6g0T2Kui0dCLU9aHff-XtI_z9fqU_TxpPyG6YqV9bJzf1wt5jGBHjLC3h7ZorO9zbConzSRAFDSNUVmgvoyqClQ%3D%3D)
---
I'm a Retired Army Captain, Purple Heart recipient, businessman, husband, father, and dedicated conservative. I'm sending you this message because I have no other choice: our country needs help and I'm answering the call-to-duty by running for the U.S. Senate in one of the most competitive elections in 2024. ---
Dear Peter, **Our rights are on the ballot in 2024!** Tim Kaine has been the **deciding vote** in getting the**Biden agenda** through the Senate. Just last month, Kaine was the deciding vote on the Biden pistol-brace rule that bans stabilizing braces on firearms. These braces are designed to simply make shooting a gun safer for those with disabilities. Our Second Amendment rights keep us safe and allow us to protect our families and our property.
I will **always** defend our Constitutional Rights.
---
[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR OUR RIGHTS! DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/a7f2c758126558dc/87e06fbc2e1fb98fc3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
The Democratic Party has shifted so far to the left that **they’re no longer even recognizable.** And Kaine is no exception. We can feel it **everywhere**. Like on Social Media, where **Big Tech giants infringe upon our First Amendment rights** by working with the Biden Administration to end free speech. We feel it through **Bidenflation** – a historic increase in inflation that’s destroyed the middle class. We feel it through **Bidenomics** \- higher costs at the gas pump, grocery store, restaurants, movies and sporting events. All while he rewards the politically connected with cronyism. It’s time for **new conservative leaders like me** to fight back against career politicians like Tim Kaine. [**Please join my campaign by pitching in anything you can today.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/a7f2c758126558dc/7b99cc64c336b39dc3d6b838967d376c/42903)

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3pbvu8faeee245va38bbu1l7gqbdrdpapbhr2f8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6ve16nmn2i58ktcp42uv93pt7ketm4vg9hcm2e0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z07ikbofj5f41cm48qla6u4rrsa9iu3gjitmd12g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1rm4po8fepm7hvqforqh6uoc7pc0pbl482s4qu8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq4l951v985s1lf2r1rql3ja0khlepuf5ftirpj0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhq9r4agndr7i0cj12obrjtm0buc9cakkan4opu0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ig9ojng9avf3e3qgtvb6v8vicf2lenei1vt270_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd6lfpl786a7jmaub6eeov60eoofnm0g8m05d460_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1j66oj4c1h2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us stop the censorship collusion
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true? _I know I don 't._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that. That's why we're suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we're asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government--collusion aimed to censor American citizens. But we need your help today. **[Which is why I'm asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O'Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2b7d7675db4f9e8df9c3f41a0ca1f6&_e=6P77h2NnMNXrqRAzlH0cLXg2pfnyuPUs1Nrs1rcKiMD058VvQ4C_tT84yrnFTq-3KDG-zvqwyQJA7kOkPGMiJOAUW37pwsyBAUC9sS6gE7YjYcJ578Wia6Ej2wIGiIDlNsQ5LruP5pJFcYnTIoYvLeBp8j9bRAAKUXTGEYPjArXIRChAIUENmUeqxfpGQiu8spBgLVOdcmFTrHtFjhX60zhS33osnQcyCbSj3lyLr_9kKnNe82WbnIiEHhuMRXTQeqwcx4QHCjZJODQ7vzS_coGWyEzs8Is08AiuSZ26gM03Jey6TzaKuhGNnLL8w0cruIj9o-pOGNR1DPlxrQHj787lmGt2XLQqcOGrqhNMt60PHYCTkiSAOf9ZxwzuWHML)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left. And these people think it's up to them to decide what's true. They think it's up to them to decide what you are and aren't allowed to say, to believe, and to share. And if you dare challenge what they've decided is true, they'll label you an agent of "misinformation" and shut you up. _That 's what happened to our client._ If you're on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him. **His name is Rogan O 'Handley, but you might know him as "@DC_Draino."** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020--he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit. That's when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla's office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan's tweets. I'm writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter of support for Rogan O'Handley and his First Amendment rights?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2b7d7675db4f9e8df9c3f41a0ca1f6&_e=6P77h2NnMNXrqRAzlH0cLXg2pfnyuPUs1Nrs1rcKiMD058VvQ4C_tT84yrnFTq-3KDG-zvqwyQJA7kOkPGMiJOAUW37pwsyBAUC9sS6gE7YjYcJ578Wia6Ej2wIGiIDlNsQ5LruP5pJFcYnTIoYvLeBp8j9bRAAKUXTGEYPjArXIRChAIUENmUeqxfpGQiu8spBgLVOdcmFTrHtFjhX600xjzWB5ZRe_qxhWxbCyJ1LfBHxOXtPQ9c8GgkLuuXoQ9Wi0RilRpMidXoLFeO9Vhv1DZvkEp2qvT3gWV32lpJBIDvO-p3RhpkOWUQDvxy1sfF2C29as_IpkSylwncT0XzhsOwJPm4zEnXa7y1hvRcVE0hBMNqFe30P9Ne8oCOmC)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it's bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform. If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it. **And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we've faced some devastating defeats. But we haven't given up because we know what this case means to the American people. And we're counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O'Handley and together let's put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2b7d7675db4f9e8df9c3f41a0ca1f6&_e=6P77h2NnMNXrqRAzlH0cLXg2pfnyuPUs1Nrs1rcKiMD058VvQ4C_tT84yrnFTq-3KDG-zvqwyQJA7kOkPGMiJOAUW37pwsyBAUC9sS6gE7YjYcJ578Wia6Ej2wIGiIDlNsQ5LruP5pJFcYnTIoYvLeBp8j9bRAAKUXTGEYPjArXIRChAIUENmUeqxfpGQiu8spBgLVOdcmFTrHtFjhX605pN8zu_rIwCb4k9tLFAiurkbIqPkh6P5300C1YVegFJFL6-G8V8GJsihVHxmILQpioNMGEtWZ8tSBd7Mr1mMxHjoZlFKPKpl7LcL5_2qqR8Djs1PkaNvk8qLdHLuNB7M69XZ_p8ITW8-Ijv9efl9Hr7c-kt4HsBNSNq5gJ73fea)** It's really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what's allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country \- Without free speech, we can't have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---

Harmeet K. Dhillon

clean_body: | | | | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true? I know I don 't. But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that. That's why we're suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we're asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government--collusion aimed to censor American citizens. But we need your help today. For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left. And these people think it's up to them to decide what's true. They think it's up to them to decide what you are and aren't allowed to say, to believe, and to share. And if you dare challenge what they've decided is true, they'll label you an agent of "misinformation" and shut you up. That 's what happened to our client. If you're on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him. His name is Rogan O 'Handley, but you might know him as "@DCDraino." And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020--he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit. That's when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla's office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan's tweets. I'm writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. This case is bigger than Rogan and it's bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform. If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it. And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU. Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we've faced some devastating defeats. But we haven't given up because we know what this case means to the American people. And we're counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. It's really quite simple: | | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what's allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country \- Without free speech, we can't have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment. America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop proposed toxic factory
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890443?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: 3,785 more signatures needed to help STOP Formosa Plastics from building a toxic factory in _CANCER ALLEY!_** **[Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890444?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** 2,400 acres along the Mississippi river destroyed. Towering smokestacks. Clouds of pollution. _**Cancer.**_ Located in a region of Louisiana known as “Cancer Alley,” Formosa Plastics’ plant would add to the more than **200 PETROCHEMICAL PLANTS** and refineries that have **_spiked cancer rates_** to astronomical levels in a predominately Black community. To make matters worse, the project would accelerate the _**PLASTICS APOCALYPSE,**_ dooming our oceans to be filled with even more plastic waste that entangles and chokes marine animals. **President Biden can REVOKE Formosa’s permit, but we need 3,785 more signatures to hit our goal and help convince him!** **[Please, Friend, send your message and help STOP a toxic plant in Cancer Alley before 11:59pm TONIGHT!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Chemical pollution -- like the waste from this proposed plant -- has been linked to **_lung, liver, heart, and brain damage!_** But that isn’t stopping Formosa Plastics -- it’s prioritizing profit over people.
This isn’t new for Formosa. In fact, it **illegally released BILLIONS of plastic pellets into local waterways for years in Texas.** Formosa can’t be trusted -- it’s made that much clear. That’s why President Biden MUST revoke Formosa’s permit. **[Tell President Biden to stand up to corporate greed and BLOCK Formosa’s dangerous factory before it’s too late!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890447?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1890446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Update 22 July 2023/ Jason Aldean Try That in a Small town
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | [Donate Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywK3SBMrhJ7gCE-u_pVa06JxcH4nz2Dc-IIPT-V1qIeR3U0qFs1c6zX610ZpOf3m-Vk5l6Z6duj-uqa-ECpXf2K8cNFX-oC7VmNt2CeJy7TJZL_LmciVv0gzJvX97G3JQByj_EFDNtpPcn7PD6NwCYn0=&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
|
---
| Friends,
This has been a busy week that took me all over our district, Washington D.C., Virginia Beach, to Lynchburg, and more.
We are living in crazy times and I may have become "numb to the dumb". Now limousine liberals, the so called elites, want to cancel country music singer, Jason Aldean, over his pro-American song "Try That in a Small Town" and they want to cancel the movie," The Sound of Freedom", a movie that exposes the evil of child sex trafficking.
In addition to refocusing on my business SEAL Team PT, here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind:
---
| Song of the Day, Try That In A Small Town
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5qgYoR4Kk6V7LyFM8pSEjcL2vLFY9JudMd7_z_Y-yPt7BJIrJVQXP2JnFd2bfM0gxFCtpGAmiFnii820LE7X5vO-jXg9YWA9DR5MPLzwNcSZ6jhs0AF5s-Ig==&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| For a little motivation, listen to this patriotic song by Jason Aldean - "Try That In A Small Town". The radical left calls this song racist and pro lynching even though 100% of the video is actual news footage. [Click here to listen and watch the music video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5qgYoR4Kk6V7LyFM8pSEjcL2vLFY9JudMd7_z_Y-yPt7BJIrJVQXP2JnFd2bfM0gxFCtpGAmiFnii820LE7X5vO-jXg9YWA9DR5MPLzwNcSZ6jhs0AF5s-Ig==&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| President Trump Screens "The Sound of Freedom"
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywPzPrxBwzMXmoCs5xsW3WZOTfJ8esMD9tGHS-fvFRAK01egit9nBHxWjNU0mh-owpieMGIrgxAwpg67v-43Lo43vlkSF3bdeOg==&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| Have you seen the movie "The Sound of Freedom"? I'm happy to learn President Trump saw the movie, The Sound of Freedom. I watched this movie with my Senate Campaign Team. This movie exposes the evil multi-billion dollar child sex trafficking trade. Despite leftist Hollywood elites attempts to cancel this film, it has crossed the $100 million mark at the domestic box office in a little over two weeks. This film has made headlines since opening on the Fourth of July and beating Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny for the day with $14.2 million. As a Delegate, Democrats killed my bill to increase felony penalties for human traffickers. I will continue that fight to stop modern day slavery in the State Senate. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywPzPrxBwzMXmoCs5xsW3WZOTfJ8esMD9tGHS-fvFRAK01egit9nBHxWjNU0mh-owpieMGIrgxAwpg67v-43Lo43vlkSF3bdeOg==&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==) to learn more about The Sound of Freedom
---
| Beatitudes
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5q4YIWdgTDkpVQap96pL4fhFuOOGwjR6W6qoH3BkcF4hKlEgdhNhU4d8dnjFXs0CPmeEL2BnvAi_uMqBIar4SslXl_Rwbm3PzwIpifVRnLZ9I=&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| I took this photo when Tracy and I spent 10 days in Israel. If you get a chance to visit Israel, you should. It was a life-changing trip. Reading the Beatitudes helps me deal with some of the craziness I experience in politics. [Click here to learn more about Beatitudes.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5q4YIWdgTDkpVQap96pL4fhFuOOGwjR6W6qoH3BkcF4hKlEgdhNhU4d8dnjFXs0CPmeEL2BnvAi_uMqBIar4SslXl_Rwbm3PzwIpifVRnLZ9I=&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| Governor Youngkin Sets Another Record
---
|
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin is our quarterback heading into November and he is working tirelessly to ensure fellow Republicans win. He just set another record by raising $5.75 million in the second quarter of 2023. That is more than any previous governor of Virginia has ever raised over an entire year. We will need that and much more to win in November. Please consider chipping in so we can win and stop the nonsense.
---
| 2024 Legislation
---
|
---
| I am excited about being your voice in the State Senate so we can continue to help fellow Virginians. For example, in Virginia, school nurses are now allowed to store and administer naloxone because of my bill [HB 2318](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5qeDLHZ0gJkESpnopWo7qdwFJoedg0bq4kiSiV_AYOzqc40p8HqQIgcWIxjqDHTAQ6hNFRxtFX3uun3LBS0kmMr2mUV_VW-p_MuV8mZdd6kyBkXe085lGCz1_d-5t7rBpIP7EbrI0fhGc=&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==). Sadly, we need a bill like this, but drug overdoses are up. The good news is allowing school nurses to administer naloxone or other opioid antagonist for drug overdoes has already saved lives.
While we are campaigning to win in November, we are also beginning to draft ideas for 2024. If you live in Senate District 10 and you have ideas on how we can improve Virginia, I would love to hear from you. Please email your legislative ideas to john@mcguireforvirginia.com
---
| More on the Push to Vote Early
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywDF4_2Ma6IolmA4kgYIehZwLQCv43WKCQgi6zl32vxsHe4A4NG4cxdszrjNaBwqeT1iHdcrBc6OPL-_5pfP67En3VCsi8sdFwoyCUIcwgerW&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| Governor Youngkin would like you to help us fight fire with fire by voting early.
"We can't go into our elections down thousands of votes. I need you to Secure Your Vote early this year." -Governor Glenn Youngkin
Please ask family members and friends to go to [Secureyourvotevirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywDF4_2Ma6IolCpkFXIN6dPtbyYBEQuMJLmzmwFtkEiy0kkwoleZxN0Nfz2op4FbP7Iw591iy3A5PNnWitr0OgiQLTNtqvF70kpxUYW2ptjcb&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)

By GREGORY S. SCHNEIDER, Washington Post Virginia Democrats say they are mounting the largest and most coordinated early voting campaign they've ever undertaken for this year's legislative elections, countering a Republican operation that's geared up to help Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) win control of the General Assembly to enact his conservative agenda. Dubbed "The Majority Project," the targeted early voting campaign is being rolled out publicly Thursday but has been in the works for months, party officials said. Democrats began hiring field staff in May and expect to continue through August, with more than 100 paid organizers already fanned out across the state, officials said.
---
| Family
---
|
---
| Now that all five of our children are grown, it is rare for my wife Tracy and I to have all five home at the same time. Make sure you hug your children a lot for they grow way too fast and they are the best part about life!
---
| Farmers Put Me To work
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Sometimes local farmers put me to work when I visit their farms in the district. I hope to visit your farm soon. Senate District 10 is the most impactful agricultural and forestry district in Virginia. In the State Senate, I'm looking forward to listening, learning, and working on legislation and ideas that help our local farmers.
---
| "Pitbull" Award
---
|
---
| In 2018, the Virginia House of Delegates gave me this "Pitbull Award". It's kind of funny, but it is true, we need fighters in Richmond. I'm not scared in the least, I'm full of energy, and I am looking forward to continuing the fight for our conservative values in the State Senate.
---
| Making Friends
---
|
---
| While campaigning, I've made many friends around the district. I look forward to meeting you and your family as well. If you see us around the district, make sure you say hello!
---
| Football Season Is Around The Corner
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Football season is right around the corner. For six years I've been attending the rumble in the jungle at Louisa county High School football games. The family atmosphere is exciting and fun. It is always a blast shooting t-shirts in the air for the attendees. Over the next four years, I'm looking forward to attending multiple new high school games across ten counties in District Ten !
---
| A Few District Photos
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Louisa County House Resolution 676
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I had the honor of presenting the general superintendent of public works, John J. Jones, of Louisa County, a Joint House Resolution recognizing his 50-plus years of service to the people of Louisa. Thank you, to the Louisa town Council and Louisa town mayor Garland Nuckols, for allowing me to make this presentation to Mr. Jones and his family. Thank you, John, for your life time of service to Louisa County. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5qR15X_Hjbx36TimIr1qS07e1GGFLkorvJlsIKtG7W7fskBYnUPWEQy3v8bW5fqjblfjykAACVOSMpQcKs1eXVJq3W891t9ZAcAcopdcxAabU=&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
| Henrico County GOP is United!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I had the honor of attending the Henrico County GOP meeting. The purpose of a GOP committee is to help grow our party, support candidates by helping them get elected, and then support Republican elected officials while in office.
It is difficult for legislators to make every GOP meeting, so if we somehow get an opening in our busy schedule and can make it to a meeting, it is standard practice across Virginia for GOP chairs to recognize and allow legislators to say hello and give an update.
Rooz Dadabhoy, founder of Rally Virginia, was the featured speaker. Thank you Rooz, and all the ladies, for the hard work you do to get Republicans around Virginia elected!
Thank you for giving me the opportunity to speak. Kudos to Henrico GOP Chair Brian Horn and your committee for working so hard to bring people together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters!
---
| Colonel Mike Waltz Retirement in D.C.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001__uKBOtIrcsrDgJ4-qJMG1g81u-sRAkOXLVRruydDX177XByx9-ywLfZiHWK8e5qWrzQhJKYgb8tpgehzo-fZWq4jGefv77s42fwL3K2NeKY_kzceZk8HmY7S_tiRSzuzvWIINKfQ4a9sIVQCfUtIw==&c=p5-JZ2yVto0XRwBcpnjbscI_-Pjt2DA5-6bjLD6LY0lr90T1_IEmCQ==&ch=B6DY9oY5Cvu9Y4nOd673zMr9yNelFOVusFPIiuVfHwUMS2qD-ISSAg==)
---
|
---

| Fellow legislators and I attended the Joint Cyber Fortress Exercise in Virginia Beach. All levels of government, agencies, law enforcement, utilities companies, and more participated in this joint effort to develop ways to protect data and secure infrastructure. Our new National Guard General James Ring, State Coordinator of Emergency Management; Shawn Talmage, Finish Cyber Warriors, and many other Distinguished Visitors participated. I'm proud my brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney and National Guard Colonel, Rusty McGuire, was there doing his part to keep fellow Virginians safe!

| It was an honor to attend the Central Virginia Planning District Commission in Lynchburg, Virginia. Congratulations to their new chair and my friend, Appomattox Mayor Richard Connor. The CVPDC is established under section 15.2-4200 of the Code of Virginia as one of 21 planning districts which serve the local governments of the Commonwealth. The CVPDC works to provide services for member localities and identify and develop opportunities for coordination among the region's local governments. Additionally, the CVPDC encourages and facilitates collaboration among local governments in addressing challenges and opportunities of greater-than-local significance.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | Friends, This has been a busy week that took me all over our district, Washington D.C., Virginia Beach, to Lynchburg, and more. We are living in crazy times and I may have become "numb to the dumb". Now limousine liberals, the so called elites, want to cancel country music singer, Jason Aldean, over his pro-American song "Try That in a Small Town" and they want to cancel the movie," The Sound of Freedom", a movie that exposes the evil of child sex trafficking. In addition to refocusing on my business SEAL Team PT, here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind: | Song of the Day, Try That In A Small Town | == | For a little motivation, listen to this patriotic song by Jason Aldean - "Try That In A Small Town". The radical left calls this song racist and pro lynching even though 100% of the video is actual news footage. == | President Trump Screens "The Sound of Freedom" | == | Have you seen the movie "The Sound of Freedom"? I'm happy to learn President Trump saw the movie, The Sound of Freedom. I watched this movie with my Senate Campaign Team. This movie exposes the evil multi-billion dollar child sex trafficking trade. Despite leftist Hollywood elites attempts to cancel this film, it has crossed the $100 million mark at the domestic box office in a little over two weeks. This film has made headlines since opening on the Fourth of July and beating Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny for the day with $14.2 million. As a Delegate, Democrats killed my bill to increase felony penalties for human traffickers. I will continue that fight to stop modern day slavery in the State Senate. == to learn more about The Sound of Freedom | Beatitudes | == | I took this photo when Tracy and I spent 10 days in Israel. If you get a chance to visit Israel, you should. It was a life-changing trip. Reading the Beatitudes helps me deal with some of the craziness I experience in politics. == | Governor Youngkin Sets Another Record | | Governor Glenn Youngkin is our quarterback heading into November and he is working tirelessly to ensure fellow Republicans win. He just set another record by raising $5.75 million in the second quarter of 2023. That is more than any previous governor of Virginia has ever raised over an entire year. We will need that and much more to win in November. Please consider chipping in so we can win and stop the nonsense. | 2024 Legislation | | I am excited about being your voice in the State Senate so we can continue to help fellow Virginians. For example, in Virginia, school nurses are now allowed to store and administer naloxone because of my bill ==. Sadly, we need a bill like this, but drug overdoses are up. The good news is allowing school nurses to administer naloxone or other opioid antagonist for drug overdoes has already saved lives. While we are campaigning to win in November, we are also beginning to draft ideas for 2024. If you live in Senate District 10 and you have ideas on how we can improve Virginia, I would love to hear from you. Please email your legislative ideas to john@mcguireforvirginia.com | More on the Push to Vote Early | == | Governor Youngkin would like you to help us fight fire with fire by voting early. "We can't go into our elections down thousands of votes. I need you to Secure Your Vote early this year." -Governor Glenn Youngkin Please ask family members and friends to go to == By GREGORY S. SCHNEIDER, Washington Post Virginia Democrats say they are mounting the largest and most coordinated early voting campaign they've ever undertaken for this year's legislative elections, countering a Republican operation that's geared up to help Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) win control of the General Assembly to enact his conservative agenda. Dubbed "The Majority Project," the targeted early voting campaign is being rolled out publicly Thursday but has been in the works for months, party officials said. Democrats began hiring field staff in May and expect to continue through August, with more than 100 paid organizers already fanned out across the state, officials said. | Family | | Now that all five of our children are grown, it is rare for my wife Tracy and I to have all five home at the same time. Make sure you hug your children a lot for they grow way too fast and they are the best part about life! | Farmers Put Me To work | | | | Sometimes local farmers put me to work when I visit their farms in the district. I hope to visit your farm soon. Senate District 10 is the most impactful agricultural and forestry district in Virginia. In the State Senate, I'm looking forward to listening, learning, and working on legislation and ideas that help our local farmers. | "Pitbull" Award | | In 2018, the Virginia House of Delegates gave me this "Pitbull Award". It's kind of funny, but it is true, we need fighters in Richmond. I'm not scared in the least, I'm full of energy, and I am looking forward to continuing the fight for our conservative values in the State Senate. | Making Friends | | While campaigning, I've made many friends around the district. I look forward to meeting you and your family as well. If you see us around the district, make sure you say hello! | Football Season Is Around The Corner | | | | Football season is right around the corner. For six years I've been attending the rumble in the jungle at Louisa county High School football games. The family atmosphere is exciting and fun. It is always a blast shooting t-shirts in the air for the attendees. Over the next four years, I'm looking forward to attending multiple new high school games across ten counties in District Ten ! | A Few District Photos | | | | | Louisa County House Resolution 676 | | | | | I had the honor of presenting the general superintendent of public works, John J. Jones, of Louisa County, a Joint House Resolution recognizing his 50-plus years of service to the people of Louisa. Thank you, to the Louisa town Council and Louisa town mayor Garland Nuckols, for allowing me to make this presentation to Mr. Jones and his family. Thank you, John, for your life time of service to Louisa County. == | Henrico County GOP is United! | | | | | | | I had the honor of attending the Henrico County GOP meeting. The purpose of a GOP committee is to help grow our party, support candidates by helping them get elected, and then support Republican elected officials while in office. It is difficult for legislators to make every GOP meeting, so if we somehow get an opening in our busy schedule and can make it to a meeting, it is standard practice across Virginia for GOP chairs to recognize and allow legislators to say hello and give an update. Rooz Dadabhoy, founder of Rally Virginia, was the featured speaker. Thank you Rooz, and all the ladies, for the hard work you do to get Republicans around Virginia elected! Thank you for giving me the opportunity to speak. Kudos to Henrico GOP Chair Brian Horn and your committee for working so hard to bring people together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters! | Colonel Mike Waltz Retirement in D.C. | == | | | This week I had the honor of attending a National Guard retirement ceremony in Washington D.C. for fellow special ops veteran Colonel Mike Waltz who attended VMI with my brother. North Central Florida, is a combat-decorated Green Beret, former White House and Pentagon policy advisor, a small business owner, an author, and a proud father. He is the first Green Beret to be elected to Congress. It was great to see fellow veteran Congresswoman Jen Kiggans in attendance as well. | My Teammate | == | Ran into an old Navy SEAL Teammate and Congressman, ==, of Wisconsin while in D.C. body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDQiL0yM9_NW2F8aBG_DeRmlSJSLcusRlBnsnNWG586colmu7_mLjWBisB-bPKJpyQISZrMirUp0i3coYLDSDQfSfKSoTuZjf9s_3czMxnN9baRS36Kw5L2tRTuk_YjHqDv3vaxtc12zviu8piLzkj91)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDRPafuDPvdAzTOmtK18I9C_3TBJ39Sawqu4cg1Is-38X2EYtSwgxRPgbPr6iPSqVQaZgBMxFR3hy54iNuxWv8tLyDZ-vHAaTIPCpaCbbwJSDBU7gfhg4t9NkL-sTOVXnqi5eD71XZBRFu1qtCFUDaDn)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDQdsQAfhq4tNJSEhl5na0fRAYTCT2TugFTyv1ejqoJ94g0CvEbbPjAl_qFYNgEII5Mgpcajnz96r3D5S3XSJYCeYSRNWvxCCI54q4uyiJSNHAs2vnsHeSdZ91M0E3CfPo7QFAOfStEF881hjHcE_ieQ)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDSE8Z3xyZLBvLH82smSgEMRM5l74KoDdEpacWTrTMNnv8dw8xg9PwmSEyTzC93SvvIc3tQ4UXXQoSv_DimXObtb-tD9cWRlmJFSkAE4ZDTBvyTxD7dydvB4FajRk0vnygIkm7DCguJOxPoY7MyP2uP5)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDS9n-H-YTIr-qk2HB4mzqUK9TXDve3mGWS4LEUkM_JbHo8gjY9zs0deEV51KQKfIsIpDN6FujwnJXaZ-hRgKExDj-SNTPP5lRdzuoQ4avTWrgWrX1XxAArCbxOgrsO1rTpu3E58htQ3tVJdt3spAP9J)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb93e53a16248e0923a0f0672946f90&_e=xEcTsohQnYrbldxyb8HkE5whIexktJzq6DDsmVhbSV89H301xFtu4_9Ww-LQcPkRf2GvLMB7Bgkbrq6T54W9gKIM1S2ZcKeoe2oPgHlYWrjmUn3-4fFHnGh0kBqNOSm9UO8js60R5Ubj_bZVjB62BAkgfmfR9cl2blxtLFP5HDTnbKcz2A2dsP0xazxYswJO-tEhJ-1dNRe4KOil8d1T9unVzbAD1MtcA4BWfleQsDOwGcEtLCD8KvXUpnlJNbcWlbuQXmn9cyWrqh4JqpV0QN3mW4IevFtAc6aXIwNbXWpD9At_DKrQAGY_ZNXzL82S)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkcseldn9usfg49sc3k38m4pi332ooas440vf79o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gm0pr2clh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2nuqpugfh8ssir7q3mm6hobb2m17a9va87ptn0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gm0pr2clh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk5crsek6f2iepure5us1kdrd2pggdmdnd7lgn78_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gm0pr2clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsl03tlbgee3pb9jm727h7m0gjauodapprm0p6c8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gm0pr2clh2bs)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Has education performance really improved? – update from Mississippi’s conservative think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570919?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**I love hearing good news about Mississippi. So, when I read recently that there had been an improvement in education standards in our state, I was thrilled.**

But then I looked at the data. **The claims being made that there has been a ‘Mississippi miracle’ just aren’t substantiated by the facts. **

**Claims of a big improvement in literacy performance are based on National Assessment of Education Progress (NAEP) scores for 4 th graders.** These show that between 2019 and 2022, Mississippi moved up the national rankings, from 29th to 21st.

But when you look at the actual scores, the average reading score for a 4th grader in 2019 was 219. By 2022 the average reading score for a 4th grader had fallen slightly to 217.

**_Far from improving, the scores went down. _**

**The reason Mississippi appeared to rise up the rankings is because reading performance for 4 th graders in other states fell even faster.**

I dug further into the same set of data, and it turns out that only one in three 4th graders in 2022 were proficient in reading. A similar number are at or below basic level reading. **Doesn’t seem much of a ‘miracle’ to me.**

Those 4th graders tested in 2022 had had to endure almost two years of Covid lockdown disruptions, often having to be absent from the classroom. Despite that, the average score fell just 2 points. What does that say about the added value of being in a classroom?

**_As for the NAEP results for math, between 2019 and 2022, average 4 th grader scores in our state fell from 241 to 234._ In other words, there was both an absolute and relative fall in performance. **

NAEP scores for 4th graders are only one way to measure education outcomes. Another benchmark are the ACT scores, which look at how students are performing at the end of 11th grade. **_The facts show falling proficiency, with an average ACT composite of 18.3 in Mississippi in 2016 falling to an average ACT composite of 17.4 in 2022_. **Again, these are the indisputable facts.

I scanned the list and could see only four school board districts in the entire state in which the ACT composite score had not fallen over those six years. Again, what miracle?

**If performance has not in fact improved, why might education bureaucrats and campaign organizations want us to believe that there had been progress? **You only need to ask the question to answer it.
---
|
---
| Mississippi also uses state student performance scores from a variety of assessments to calculate reading and math proficiency. For the first time in more than two decades, the cumulative scores in 2022 for reading and math proficiency in Mississippi school districts appeared to show improvement. A sign of progress? Not really.

**_The apparent uptick in district proficiency scores between 2016 and 2022 in math and reading reflects the fact that in 2022 they stopped including end-of-course testing for seniors. _**The year before that change was made, there was no evidence of an improvement in standards.

The ‘progress’ in these state scores and consequential decline in the number of F rated school districts is almost entirely a reflection of eliminating the end of course tests for seniors which raised proficiency percentages and increased the graduation rate.

**Doctoring data to sustain a fictitious narrative about improving education standards does our state a grave disservice. **

Back in the old Soviet Union, local officials use to annually report record levels of agricultural output and an extraordinary increase in the number of tractors produced. Was this proof that the system was working? Quite the opposite. No one wanted to be the one not to report record rises. **It did not pay to challenge the dodgy data.**

**The education system in Mississippi is not working either. **It is deeply disingenuous to claim improvements in performance when the data shows a decline. **Those making these claims must know the truth, but they chose to gloss over it. Mississippi deserves better than that. **

Education progress is possible when the vested interests that run public education are no longer able to run the system in their interests. **_Progress will only come about when families in our state are given control over their child’s education tax dollars – as is about to happen in Arkansas. _**

**The sooner people realize the truth about education standards in our state, the sooner they will demand parent power to put it right. The vested interests know that, which is why they aren’t being honest with you. **
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=01ffce70f3&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2b5c6fe828) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2b5c6fe828).
