body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9628a587dcd4bef958e815a46cafc58&_e=LuAoeaBs2vMnXd5Yr1ecKp_24TovXBcCF6Eg39UUQ-TgX2SZ_Q3q30K12JfoDHXwBC6Ymll0BHifmv9C1qdQLAaRQfwkKRC53ZVfdMiPAY7jxpWc8zqctmd1Jrom0VfTniT6xRzuHJCMPcBW7DYvcJqtaZLZIS0Jb3ChO_3ikWt7pby7NNO4AIRbIjLYfKsnXyn9W4HELsRTWc2tU_UWj7sDTdPidCKStL5Ui_1zvEy9yAB-v1BSo22iL64emTgWMRTM4O0hOXPVB56HnvLBaQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9628a587dcd4bef958e815a46cafc58&_e=LuAoeaBs2vMnXd5Yr1ecKp_24TovXBcCF6Eg39UUQ-TgX2SZ_Q3q30K12JfoDHXwBC6Ymll0BHifmv9C1qdQLAaRQfwkKRC53ZVfdMiPAY7jxpWc8zqctmd1Jrom0VfTfXzKIWy0mR9GzCSZPGBKYA0EenHUj4RHQbn7QqGsQCYVxdOWSlDW8Tlg-Xm-YZ058fPKd3abo-0M5EMpl_lmZ6JC11CKzIrc6tLUZV3go-7wJgXIUhUGpRH2lYjuBU-xNA7uYkDmuYqL5oaXyMpvSw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9628a587dcd4bef958e815a46cafc58&_e=LuAoeaBs2vMnXd5Yr1ecKp_24TovXBcCF6Eg39UUQ-TgX2SZ_Q3q30K12JfoDHXwBC6Ymll0BHifmv9C1qdQLAaRQfwkKRC53ZVfdMiPAY7jxpWc8zqctmd1Jrom0VfT2lKkQP3gP3dlnEibJees9DVKPKkbZ2rawD8cQeJlktnr16d2HNiTWuaSJpEeIQVRaMA4XrwCHUQedIILhI633w1nwWiRFeBe7LMm3n1xEHw_PSHyb0MVx51vS4VRDy8vqnVmexOv_MHoiKJ8r78pdg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Here’s what I asked the IRS whistleblowers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
The DOJ covered up the Biden family corruption. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b21dddbee3&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

This week in Washington, I took action to ban our public schools from being used to house illegal immigrants and questioned IRS whistleblowers about the Biden family's corrupt business dealings.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **THE DOJ COVERED UP THE BIDEN FAMILY CORRUPTION**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ac64274f7b&e=1050d051da)
---
| CLICK [HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3c137c1677&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW
---
| Two credible, non-partisan IRS whistleblowers dropped **BOMBSHELL** testimony on the Biden family corruption to the Oversight Committee this week.

Here's what the whistleblowers confirmed:
* The Biden family received **MILLIONS** of dollars from China, Ukraine, and Romania funneled to them through over 20 shell companies.
* Joe Biden knew about Hunter's foreign business dealings.
* The IRS investigators wanted to follow the facts that could have led them to Joe Biden but the DOJ stopped them.

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=616ee539d2&e=1050d051da)
---
| The Oversight Committee **BLEW THE LID** off the Biden family corruption this week. Now the White House is doing everything they can to stop our investigation.

**But one thing is clear: Joe Biden and the DOJ are compromised.**

Joe Biden weaponized the federal government to **TARGET** American patriots and **PROTECT** DC liberal elites. There's one set of rules if your last name is Biden and another set for everyone else.

This two-tiered system of justice is **DISGUSTING**. Mark my words, the Oversight Committee will continue fighting to uncover the truth and we will **NOT** be bullied by the corrupt bureaucrats in the White House. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d73ba7c12d&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **STOPPING SCHOOLS FROM HOUSING ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e4fc97c725&e=1050d051da)
---
| Schools are for **LEARNING** , not for housing illegal immigrants.

It sounds like commonsense but liberal cities across America are trying to house the influx of illegal immigrants in our public schools.

As a father of four young kids, it's disgraceful that liberals are putting the well-being of **ILLEGAL** **IMMIGRANTS** over America's children.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1455391644&e=1050d051da)
---
| House Republicans **WILL NOT** let children pay the price for Kamala Harris and Joe Biden's worsening border crisis.

_**We passed a bill this week BANNING the use of public schools as migrant shelters. House Democrats are so extreme that over 200 Democrats voted against it.**_

Republicans are fighting to build the wall, hire more Border Patrol agents, and treat the Mexican cartels for what they really are—terrorist organizations.****[**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0792cdc404&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=38657ba35a&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30518e1c9490442eace2a8dc2065bc4c&_e=oJjuDvHGtehQihMvP8pAzFSn9O-sGteZnicIuxmogYKvK6njN3jRqFEIDrCvXhb3RHoF-s0-rNhWm1NLeHMR_4_40L2URV_XF1J45rl8QPm9n0t9bpsWIrw8OCY9eEs79f0qilnW-6cGKi51pgAveLs8m3rJ7ElAUxr15PFmjGp8zLZQaZEYVloicXPURg-pFpQ8Qc-jswz_cWPmf3dwUCg3-vebj1fOP-KLqel6iRl56BasVxrd7tybO_vOe_ucv-3hTXtZFGAGvLia5iR1Tw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30518e1c9490442eace2a8dc2065bc4c&_e=oJjuDvHGtehQihMvP8pAzFSn9O-sGteZnicIuxmogYKvK6njN3jRqFEIDrCvXhb3RHoF-s0-rNhWm1NLeHMR_4_40L2URV_XF1J45rl8QPm9n0t9bpsWIrw8OCY9eEs7vw-7Qdk80RMP-vZSM5Ebh1F9zWDY7biG1s7EL4T6um5JzqJXeEx6xj3lWqNbhTpMls7n5q7AzPgApn3Mfhe7dmAhH7q5J5CgjQVij4V8-buwHXE8z_jLbjEZelJiA9VsNGxdIzSxDOziq5OHALfIgQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30518e1c9490442eace2a8dc2065bc4c&_e=oJjuDvHGtehQihMvP8pAzFSn9O-sGteZnicIuxmogYKvK6njN3jRqFEIDrCvXhb3RHoF-s0-rNhWm1NLeHMR_4_40L2URV_XF1J45rl8QPm9n0t9bpsWIrw8OCY9eEs7naDlxUztbAtXPnWi6EHxDBMt_-pQw1p91Yi7S1GQ6CBVqy4jKw76D8KX_zS4KjqSyD0qoLt-2vjLSpwUdIg4tW8lU0W76z-aAPJEx4VZ02B_PohamwpYBwXAMA_mXWB0Z0GJL4jGWdS6Y36-qubrWQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s True Legacy
body:
Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst "president" of the United States...but Barack Obama is still the worst thing that happened to our republic. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have joined other conservative powerhouses to publish _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ -[ and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df8c1b9990e40bba5dc991b7cc9542e&_e=2qEF3rRgF04B_bsE_KYvXZ3mLo8B1gvy_jW5hbWQAFFPJmJT9HhVkrnvfz7XZH7pZJYVc-Mt_h6ZfTA1FKLANfOHVV53UosxmqxFIDT3V8by1SLOVxPKGA6NoY5BetzdDxnLc6Eov-9HaRYEEpVp2JejItAhpMQkTEsMdPHOGcDC_Tud5JVgFgp4YqVGCmOr2BPpftX6wNStZtkbUG6NHOV0BVVxuTg8F5ZlFHOX3koOwzs0KzjKaYx2t8e1T9U-rvxGP2-0w6MJ4c_zU0-piE05gkk4l8mCSRMBocrmwBYZ2J1l04zUmSTJHz7Nti2O-qdqC8L86bpe2KrFC-FXeQIUNRKOL_Vh_gNE3eCl81fhtDs8PScComCCJJ3Pir2r)** So many of our fellow citizens think the nightmare we've been living for the past three years came from nowhere. They think that this "administration" is made up of incompetent fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden's cognitive state. But the truth is much darker, friend. **This decline was by design - and in many ways, Barack Hussein Obama was its chief architect.** That's why I believe _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ is one of the most important books of the year, [**and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today today, I 'll send you a complimentary copy.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4df8c1b9990e40bba5dc991b7cc9542e&_e=2qEF3rRgF04B_bsE_KYvXZ3mLo8B1gvy_jW5hbWQAFFPJmJT9HhVkrnvfz7XZH7pZJYVc-Mt_h6ZfTA1FKLANfOHVV53UosxmqxFIDT3V8by1SLOVxPKGA6NoY5BetzdDxnLc6Eov-9HaRYEEpVp2JejItAhpMQkTEsMdPHOGcDC_Tud5JVgFgp4YqVGCmOr2BPpftX6wNStZtkbUG6NHOV0BVVxuTg8F5ZlFHOX3kqv8iRbVcKBoo4HbaDk5L_ihB84YwkJygSsnUoUbuUK_LGdLq2eQDMXh7sGhys5ijz08wpPulMVFY4I65KdnMSVjOdzl3nN90f1q5GY5nW8kWF3zBJ_Rze_Yl3VuTmiGv94wZ71_D_4ia6mLNv_wCM7) In his first week in office, Joe Biden signed a record number of executive orders, taking a wrecking ball to all the hard work President Trump did to get our country back on track. He brought us back to where Obama left off, and now, with his White House full of Obama holdovers, he intends to finish what his old boss started. We can't let that happen, friend. But if we can't stop an enemy that we don't understand. That's where this incredible book comes in, and why I need patriots like you to read it immediately.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Michael Finch President, The David Horowitz Freedom Center

body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf73bca23-bcb8-4d8b-9c2f-7079dafb35f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | The time for action is now! We cannot afford to remain silent as the burden of student debt continues to weigh down millions of borrowers. Together, we can break the chains of this oppressive system and demand the relief that is long overdue. The recent Supreme Court ruling in Biden v. Nebraska dealt a blow to student debt relief efforts, but it did not extinguish our resolve. [We stand firm in our support for President Biden's commitment to use the Higher Education Act to cancel student debt and create a fairer system. If you’re with us, we need to know by midnight tonight. We need another 5,125 people to join us. Add your name now →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf186567-a6c0-4fd9-a5cd-d31ae0f1d307/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-sSRGXI7LnaeIQ)

Fellow Conservative, Did you see my email yesterday? **My podcast co-host Ben Ferguson and I sat down with Congressman James Comer, the House Oversight Committee Chairman investigating Hunter Biden.**** ** **[Listen to the explosive episode HERE.](http://trk.tedcruz.)**** ** On the podcast, Chairman Comer explains the shocking evidence his committee has uncovered. _According to Comer, multiple banks issued Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) against members of the Biden Family.__ _ That may not sound like a big deal. But here’s the thing – banks only submit SARs when they suspect their client has committed a crime. And most Americans go their whole lives without ever receiving _one_ SAR. _**The Biden Crime Family received 170!**_** ** SARs are triggered by large, suspicious deposits that hit an account out of the blue. And that’s exactly what happened in the Bidens’ case – dozens of times. The banks suspected that the Bidens were using shell companies to launder money from entities owned by foreign governments. For example, one Biden account maintained a modest balance of $40,000-$50,000 for over a decade – and was hit with a **$3 million deposit from Communist China**. That’s just scratching the surface! Chairman Comer’s committee has discovered that at least nine Biden family members received payments from China, Romania, and Ukraine. This story just keeps getting more INSANE at every turn. And you don’t want to miss Chairman Comer’s deep dive into the investigation of the Biden Crime Family on the latest _Verdict_ podcast. **[Please listen now and support my campaign HERE >>](http://trk.tedcruz.-_2ObMUiXTU-yyuPWuOw)**** ** For Liberty,

* * *
Peter — we can no longer ignore the alarming rate of gun violence in America.
We've had nearly 400 mass shootings and 24,000 gun-related deaths in the U.S. just this year. And what's the weapon of choice? Assault rifles.
Here's the thing: _Experts estimate that a national ban on assault weapons could cut deaths in mass shootings by a WHOPPING 70%._ It's a no-brainer.
President Biden is on board, but we need Congress to act NOW. Do you agree that it's long overdue for Washington to ban assault weapons?
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66866696/417837286/-1145746972?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLLBanAssaultWeapons_072223_RS_y2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExN2FiZGFkLThmMjgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gboVeS34g_CNVtNz-SCCWEEnTgtHbP5OFziRF032-to=)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66866700/417837290/-1145746972?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLLBanAssaultWeapons_072223_RS_n2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImExN2FiZGFkLThmMjgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gboVeS34g_CNVtNz-SCCWEEnTgtHbP5OFziRF032-to=)**

name: Annie Andrews
subject: What you’ve missed→
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friends of TFOV,

It’s been an incredibly busy summer of travel over here at TFOV. We hit the ground running during our launch this Spring and haven’t slowed down.

Renee and I spent the week in Washington, D.C. advocating for kids, meeting with members of Congress and spreading the word about our plans for 2024.

Read more about what’s happened during our trip, then **_[click here to support our work as we continue building our advocacy programs out.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD97moR-9bKL6wT-5fr9PVm80Dnwn7VbTjmpq5lWwwPCHnLHq6aP9utUw2GQ2xAbfTHj7VNn6foqeWTLELoM5rPYb4HzFmCt4lsN23uYxTkQ5KxYflBiBZqN01VkR_H-xWB00x4MCfaX1Vs8e_POtHBPMagMtPaXahAWGwam2hFjjXeMORhaUs2RI05GHADUBlRz61lbKaE-I_YIwV5vJaK0k/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h0/vUt020l2vpKXXpi71533wURhHxToNRJSmdQeKBiiqjI)_**

| → We were honored to partner with the What to Expect Project in their #BumpDay campaign. The goal of the campaign is to raise awareness about the need for equitable care for every mom, everywhere, and to urge elected representatives to take action to support safe pregnancies and healthy babies.

We know that safe and healthy moms lead to safe and healthy kids. We were able to meet Heidi Murkoff, the author of _What to Expect When You’re Expecting._ She is an incredible champion for babies and moms on the Hill and will be an important partner for us in our work.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD96YqcW-gZBgE-dwQn-1-bMaBElWpOn-j4WhJyJkMdgl5pTk1B0LQ2KCLQ-Xd6TPGNwOxijdjxTauWlEOxdrJtA7XP58bWihKH0ismb_-aZ6-HlAYJVHt1Gmuyr2wlzno9OWxyN-gBXCGfu9S8fi5Md9YWlvvQVIhxtuGJEuzea88N1HaqkwaRt27bD-2s5l2zOVntttNEL3v0Xnc95VkVAv/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h1/lF3q6OEj3RcyGvo82ji3DzfsvzfdLnU3ErZEhNDS2Bs)
→ We attended a Congressional briefing on maternal mental health and heard from Representatives Young Kim, Robin Kelly and Jimmy Gomez. The conversation was powerful, but Rep Gomez’s son Hodge definitely stole the show!

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD978sfVzqcJRbdO25aT-iw6igQhv09V1OZyZ1RYNvqoZgReVBhtoXWQY-aJYyoR-34UYqCtNQ_3_4SaKJBDrBPj-S-k6gmKYIRKsfmXrkUfPvzG6LBdZZKpjjYI4Uih8i1wNDBNXED5C6XLismMvM6CK_TTYMIzqffAwal3vFXpWgIpfE3gHSvs2ChUf6roGQBO2vdPn2sakh0TS8shz5N8u/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h2/ezsJfylpXAmnM8lpz_rOd9dHSxNiMiZLFCFhkPskBq0)
→ We had another great meeting with an important partner, Brady PAC. They are working diligently to elect champions for gun safety and we are proud to be in this fight with them.

→ We met with our media team to discuss our plans for the coming months. While communication around election time is critical to educate voters, we want to start that work now, so that moms, dads, grandparents and everyone who cares about children begin to see the link between their vote and children’s well-being. Stay tuned!

→ I was able to spend some time at Everytown to discuss my new role there as a Senior Advisor. I’m honored to be a part of the work they are doing to create safer communities for our children.

→ It wouldn’t be a trip to Washington, D.C. without a stop in Rep Kim Schrier’s office. Her office has become our home away from home. We’re so proud of the work she’s doing on the Hill to advocate for kids. Our job is to work as hard as we can to send her a #KidsFirst majority in 2024, so we can build the future our children need.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD97oZ-dnRBxhGxaAXzfLtZSAU_M4fJhXWB_56SW_tTHrjP4s1GnhqujGkUuUQR39m2xrZUNmZrxmzPbz2az7Hdk-Tq4-sX8w0hSHQJWZ38ATQ5bsaXAKZJrUSKFk-eNi86OVpNXOhYYTyO08An-wuV2wnO85g28AH5xuqhiVsAViJM6dfCbC8wora4AlgS4OT3Exs_mJtEY8JjS_9OW6_3Co/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h3/m3tBOr0ECqnQfNf5R-nPy2gXNqV92jc9tSqkw-iEBRA)
→ We also had the opportunity to catch up with Rep. Landsman from OH. He’s a former school teacher turned City Councilman turned Congressman.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD96fh1IGVFyg8KHyD3DPeWDDCce2FocGpmbyPbFOetLLXxommwg1j3-Rm2kvjG8fsERIHiNLq9mUpLO0kVGfMZY5N_tvP1V_B1RAn3aH-ovh_iklnPvBFGm_xbww7luB0r-4_Bcxf56YfAls28TCxLYvENtFk0Borxa7lIKl7HTshEON_K-qIvx4p9aMhU09jn2kY1OWYQVsOMTd4yQ6YpTe/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h4/s-0LjcjroYzMqPymuY5NaflSc4oO0PuLCyB40fXxoSo)
He has dedicated his entire career in public office to fighting for kids specifically, in the area of early childhood education. We’re proud to call him a friend of Their Future PAC.
---

Renee and I had an eventful trip home, but are happy to report we are safe and sound back in South Carolina and eager to hit the road again soon to continue our fight for kids.

Thank you for your support. We couldn’t do this without you.

— Annie

_P.S. If you are able, please consider _**[donating to our organization to keep our work up.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywjAHk5iaSyuXGJuhV0BPwa_xKTDsopFvjs3kbm8iG6H0ACfrzvu0uX6G2_-jA06aE1tQPcL-s6t1fTwSIyhxh8mFp6h2wueh92-Cue4puxVP96ruSY9p_V97O54eoD97LxpCI9fAaR7lgj_k8dWzx-vvOXD_ulrsIjuqbjOtRVilLmyO2VGD92_P1_CCsCKPb1OobZBt2tcNJhAQegIw2MiRyy80vwDV_RXB4WEAE6j7L_ci5kHgfqCgEx-H76nrzNBUq9QxqOGzyinWzebc6numoXFvdsZJ_skFASEsBr0vwBmfng5C1TZ1AGAmZmMaxHKeKnBHvIruiIXL68VTK/3y3/GcVKZhg5RdW5KS7D4lePug/h5/Bkg7JfLDh8Hv8w9IrPW_JJigaOPmbxl3RNkM7CzwfeM)**__

clean_body: | | | Friends of TFOV, It’s been an incredibly busy summer of travel over here at TFOV. We hit the ground running during our launch this Spring and haven’t slowed down. Renee and I spent the week in Washington, D.C. advocating for kids, meeting with members of Congress and spreading the word about our plans for 2024. Read more about what’s happened during our trip, then | → We were honored to partner with the What to Expect Project in their #BumpDay campaign. The goal of the campaign is to raise awareness about the need for equitable care for every mom, everywhere, and to urge elected representatives to take action to support safe pregnancies and healthy babies. We know that safe and healthy moms lead to safe and healthy kids. We were able to meet Heidi Murkoff, the author of What to Expect When You’re Expecting. She is an incredible champion for babies and moms on the Hill and will be an important partner for us in our work. → We attended a Congressional briefing on maternal mental health and heard from Representatives Young Kim, Robin Kelly and Jimmy Gomez. The conversation was powerful, but Rep Gomez’s son Hodge definitely stole the show! → We had another great meeting with an important partner, Brady PAC. They are working diligently to elect champions for gun safety and we are proud to be in this fight with them. → We met with our media team to discuss our plans for the coming months. While communication around election time is critical to educate voters, we want to start that work now, so that moms, dads, grandparents and everyone who cares about children begin to see the link between their vote and children’s well-being. Stay tuned! → I was able to spend some time at Everytown to discuss my new role there as a Senior Advisor. I’m honored to be a part of the work they are doing to create safer communities for our children. → It wouldn’t be a trip to Washington, D.C. without a stop in Rep Kim Schrier’s office. Her office has become our home away from home. We’re so proud of the work she’s doing on the Hill to advocate for kids. Our job is to work as hard as we can to send her a #KidsFirst majority in 2024, so we can build the future our children need. → We also had the opportunity to catch up with Rep. Landsman from OH. He’s a former school teacher turned City Councilman turned Congressman. He has dedicated his entire career in public office to fighting for kids specifically, in the area of early childhood education. We’re proud to call him a friend of Their Future PAC. Renee and I had an eventful trip home, but are happy to report we are safe and sound back in South Carolina and eager to hit the road again soon to continue our fight for kids. Thank you for your support. We couldn’t do this without you. — Annie P.S. If you are able, please consider * | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC If you need to you can unsubscribe by . | | Sent via . body:
We're bound to see more records like this.

| Peter,

Earlier this month, we experienced the hottest week ever recorded on Earth. We're bound to see more records like this, and as global temperatures rise, we must be prepared.

As Public Lands Commissioner, Hilary has been in every corner of the state over the last seven years. **From record droughts to floods and rampant wildfires, she's seen the direct impact of our climate crisis.** Her work to make Washington the national leader in wildfire preparedness helped us tackle our worst drought ever last year – with 94 percent of our fires below 10 acres.

Hilary knows climate change affects everyone. As our next governor, she's ready to preserve the land we call home and ensure every Washingtonian can thrive. But to get there, she needs your help. clean_body: We're bound to see more records like this. | = | Peter, Earlier this month, we experienced the hottest week ever recorded on Earth. We're bound to see more records like this, and as global temperatures rise, we must be prepared. As Public Lands Commissioner, Hilary has been in every corner of the state over the last seven years. From record droughts to floods and rampant wildfires, she's seen the direct impact of our climate crisis. Her work to make Washington the national leader in wildfire preparedness helped us tackle our worst drought ever last year – with 94 percent of our fires below 10 acres. Hilary knows climate change affects everyone. As our next governor, she's ready to preserve the land we call home and ensure every Washingtonian can thrive. But to get there, she needs your help. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = In this together, Franz for WA * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWtyvr_DN-

Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next
level?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWtyvr_DN-

Fellow
Patriot,

Are you
ready to take the fight to save America to the next level?

If so, I
have a special offer for you.

I want to
send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!

Thousands
of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your
turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any
amount to Turning Point USA.

That's
right - ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of
shipping.

Click
here to get yours before we run out of copies!

Get
Your Copy >>

Until
now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make
gifts of $100 or more.

But
frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that
selective.

As far as
I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little --
even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I
need to get this valuable book into your hands.

If that's
you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.

How We
Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will
secure victories for American Greatness that will last for
generations to come.

You see,
after ELEVEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA...

...
ELEVEN YEARS criss-crossing the country...

...
ELEVEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on
college campuses...

... I
have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where
conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to
come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to
happen.

We must
become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right...
a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the
moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the
greatest in the history of the world.

How We
Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how
we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for
generations to come.

But to do
it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped
patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to
arm you with this book today.

Get
Your Copy >>

And
remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can
rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book.
You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth
organization in America.

Turning
Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again
so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture
War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students
on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about
saving America...we're DOING IT!

But we
can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission.
That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a
donation of any amount to Turning Point USA.

Just
click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's
gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you
and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of
patriots all across America.

Get
Your Copy >>

Please,
don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a
part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's
right.

Claim
your copy of How We Win today and help us secure victories for
American Greatness!

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

body:
| | |
---
| | **100 years later and we're still fighting for women's equality.**
---
**YOUR SIGNATURE NEEDED:**
---
**[Sign the petition to show your support for codifying the Equal Rights Amendment in New York's Constitution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867893/417841638/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)**
---
| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867894/417841640/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, 100 years ago today, the National Women's Party bravely unveiled the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) in Seneca Falls, New York – the birthplace of the American women's rights movement.
And, though the ERA never became the 28th Amendment in our U.S. Constitution that it should've been, the amendment – which guarantees equal rights for women – still gained enough traction to be passed in **_38 states_** and counting. So, while Members of Congress are fighting to have the ERA codified and published, I’m supporting the state amendment.

**That's why, on this centennial anniversary, I'm traveling to Seneca Falls to celebrate the ERA and encourage New Yorkers to vote for equality in 2024 by voting to pass a New York Equal Rights Amendment worthy of the 21st century. [If you're in support of passing New York's ERA too, help me get 10,000 signatures to my petition today to join the fight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867895/417841641/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867896/417841644/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, the Equal Rights Amendment that was first unveiled in 1923 was nothing short of a groundbreaking step in the fight for equality – but it also lacks all of the protections that we urgently need.
Now that the conservative Supreme Court has overturned Roe v. Wade, we _must_ have a constitutional amendment that protects individuals against any government actions that would curtail a person's access to reproductive health care or reproductive autonomy.
Now that far-right lawmakers around the nation and the Supreme Court have chipped away at the protections of LGBTQ+ people on the basis of "religious freedom," we _must_ have a constitutional amendment that protects all New Yorkers from discrimination – including LGBTQ+ individuals.
Now that Republicans are attempting to turn the clock for women's rights back decades at a time, we need an amendment that protects New Yorkers from these threats and more – and that's exactly what the Equal Rights Amendment sets out to do.
But, Peter, it's not up to me if the ERA passes in New York – it's up to the voters in November 2024. All I can really do is gather support for the amendment – and that's where you come in.
**On this monumental anniversary, I'm counting on at least 10,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition before midnight to codify the ERA.[So please, will you add your name now to show your support for New York's ballot initiative to pass the Equal Rights Amendment?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867897/417841645/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66867898/417841646/-59667797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1138-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDRhMGE1Yy05MDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_gGMwN8Ip_b4WmzqeE8wNRMbV2s2IijAHDjsRGcZA=&emci=bbf560f2-4827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=1d4a0a5c-9028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=25369504)
---
With strength and solidarity from Seneca Falls, New York,

Letitia

Now that Republicans are attempting to turn the clock for women's rights back decades at a time, we need an amendment that protects New Yorkers from these threats and more – and that's exactly what the Equal Rights Amendment sets out to do. But, Peter, it's not up to me if the ERA passes in New York – it's up to the voters in November 2024. All I can really do is gather support for the amendment – and that's where you come in. On this monumental anniversary, I'm counting on at least 10,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition before midnight to codify the ERA. | | With strength and solidarity from Seneca Falls, New York, Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A few free minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Between my newborn Isla, the campaign, and my work in the House, let me tell you: These free minutes are a gift.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=1&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)
Hey Peter, it’s Ruben.
I got a few free minutes this morning.
Between my newborn Isla and everything else going on, let me tell you: These free minutes are a gift.
So, here’s the deal:
I know a lot of you have been on this list since before my first campaign for Congress.
I know some of you joined at some point in the last few elections.
And, if we’re being honest, there are a lot of folks reading this email simply because I am running against Kyrsten Sinema. No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.
People like me don’t often make it to Congress.
I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq.
The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.
As a kid, the support from my family.
In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.
And in my campaigns, support from people like you.
So now I’ve got a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and voting to expand voting rights, protect abortion access, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.
But I can’t do that without your help. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my campaign? I’ve taken some time with family since Isla was born, and our fundraising has taken a hit since then. I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=2&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-july23.s7nZFC&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=21&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-july23.G2NsYa&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=22&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-july23.IB_0hu&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=23&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-july23.KsOehc&refcode=em230722-1-30&t=24&akid=830%2E734936%2EVsz9XQ)**

Thanks in advance for lending a hand. It means a lot to me.
-Ruben

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq520jrp8jd7scs52vkpmmqf97j9c5ira93p5ml0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gmaoj6chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjtb9cokp0d5mukpppbp5rgv4bovekg110u0acsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gmaoj6chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvtgnovu7e64133i79hjmmgetscfkqiig57sea0g_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gmaoj6chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zafim07i92pa6uk5m25l293j1pforhqcpnbn4rk0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gmaoj6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr7391o6odchvmev2n8j8jhihrbqbs1cfr0asc1o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1gmaoj6chh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Ny4xHzKLVbxr%2bT7nnFEgg&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Ny4xHzKLVbxr%2bT7nnFEgg&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTSClgbL9ZQBqjeTZSp%2fpg&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662224%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v8agTd3Ot7Ln2YnK5pbKSA&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662235%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O1%2biZG9xCWSuNLUdOckk%2fA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662236%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jDjAMJYAga1IM686eD%2bQ2A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bpCIOwR8LoRfF1NS1UNdGA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aFDC1E6f%2bAAUl1Wu%2bWhJig&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662239%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yygeE44uRYEZnxlhnc%2biBQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662230%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bzq5cMV%2beZDTTgBMxVtnJA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662231%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=poC1BvbhREpo1TYwNGUV4A&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662232%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hc6RWhT2Ls%2bAkNG4lBtZTg&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662233%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n7pBYx1ODxg9HjDXJL4f8w&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662234%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2f%2fTr7VzK7ejbYPMLEOSUQ&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662245%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DgBPJ3G2vW77t3QY5HkU6Q&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662246%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4NIx%2bf%2blFXZ8OrjA0OCdTA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662247%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fyIoP7PudeOcpSZMk2QOag&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1374%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=h7KD9%2bntSwuxQ8pul9qTnA&sysid=1)

body:

| Friend — Josh Hawley and the National Republican Senatorial Committee are so afraid of our movement, they’ve not only spent half a year attacking me for playing a card game... They know we’ve built a record-breaking and worker-led coalition that can defeat Josh Hawley, and now they’re scared.

Friend,

Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis here.

**As we gear up for the crucial 2024 election, I am reaching out to you, one of our most dedicated supporters, to ask for your help. The future of our great nation is at stake, and we need to ensure a resounding victory for our conservative values.**

The road ahead won't be easy, but with your support, we can secure a brighter future for all Americans. Grassroots donations from supporters like you play a pivotal role in fueling our campaign and spreading our message far and wide.

**[Will you stand with me as we fight for lower taxes, strong borders, and a limited government?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIh9UMmiadnfeYQGrvspVi4R2yhNSSQ6geeFOtOMDkLdAkRb1V6mootF4QLOn02Wzz0aQNhlmwfxmDwdCa8wW7uH4NC5rn1Uki9sLHG-sOwYsH4m2owUdMaF7zE1LHRRshumd4o5Y7Qh3oeRjG7CVM7xJahm7B4plc1pirNZ9Aq2DJZfWA6b2XUerGEtwK_icQIyDDawONBsBO8445kMxzY-j2mP4yZejIAO8r_Ea0QmvGCj_aeLQjQYX43XFrhO2rUK-p6hy0FqZY6emyFW5E0XfA-FT9-BX3oU_6raxqtMm)** Every dollar you contribute will go directly towards critical campaign initiatives, like building a robust ground game to talk to as many constituents as possible, and running effective advertising campaigns.

**[Your generous donation of $25, $50, or any amount you can contribute today will help us secure victory in 2024.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIh9UMmiadnfeYQGrvspVi4R2yhNSSQ6geeFOtOMDkLdAkRb1V6mootF4QLOn02Wzz0aQNhlmwfxmDwdCa8wW7uH4NC5rn1Uki9sLHG-sOwYsH4m2owUdMaF7zE1LHRRshnFNcguQgxbGx_pPXhy64qG-HhXdc8N6Xk0s0ToPScTi0pczOvAtiiQKMzvhWByzovfY-RzPx9G8BLkGmBmgukn29NSoZsTzQv75AD7tT-_grIRS67YRNFy9fgNYbsify1wn7pY_mGWuiWeT-KaD_1SsZ9E0Juww-xH7jVxQ_Ah8)** Together, we can defend our values and make a real difference in the lives of hard working Americans.

Click [here](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIh9UMmiadnfeYQGrvspVi4R2yhNSSQ6geeFOtOMDkLdAkRb1V6mootF4QLOn02Wzz0aQNhlmwfxmDwdCa8wW7uH4NC5rn1Uki9sLHG-sOwYsH4m2owUdMaF7zE1LHRRshnKxOBjPYffIVkM8juXHfQ3schDARWf1VBGD4JeJsxcwmlWNNaEmjk21CvvXJWZA51uD8HptydqOLPcsf2J1QAx2aJinh8GkCt30l9blWgPE1GZZbUtJZlEvwr2ue3SLJyT3qzbjqQnS_f1W6FugBffI7CSUlyYRm-ra0L-ecl_d) to make your secure online contribution now. Remember, no amount is too small, and your support means the world.

**_Thank you for being a strong advocate for our shared conservative principles. Together, we can pave the way to a stronger and more prosperous America._**

Gratefully,

Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis

[](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIhohkxKWVAJ_ljTSce9BL4g2BKuSXB5n947kUFcTQ4OBd33pI3uAEcoQeKKr47CBAAV3kG9KaOPVvDIPjM-7w7WtLak5mwYpGuY1CCbABP_wWueIewKK6qn618Nm2q0VLXGVRZ2WEDYKLkEeusG7_z8HA18rkPhUgPHESOK01kKC3VwfgzeauEq93pNYQo4w-wusMzBsCgFXvADGQSaCV2s%3D) [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIsXO2WJTosI8HM78lRzQec-TJJ8HTAK4Y4ngIZD7GcMnRyp6-0szo1ymcy1DHDlRgzL8lXSFDfvF_G7dW4L4qMxIcq3oBazXlJJQ1uA0iRsDU-du7wiWrACVCPdok8cofY70ZSmMujbqzQkrNlPQM87HY2afD2vFXFpb8Xo6-nxC0P8Su3M7y59DJiy-uOzHOg%3D%3D) [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=528192b8e9f848b1bad5deeedca98b01&_e=1ukvwTrxdJBGVui64UeOIsZUbSQbwjtUHOu11c6WzpYbuW4NvwnnwkE4TPRKFpEsSVDrBi9iLPNaOTR47cNM-i0Dkf6bWYCXQakdY1f0CX_qFkfaDioSXXuM5pimpOQmpHEXD63jZEODoFXK3INWYOfF0pfKDxFuF7SGRQfRKYCEJawUmZWnR1SeOgjvTI9hkYRf7htlG2Z6F_16m_F0U2MyM0Q6OHnp_kqM6yt-8PM%3D)

Team, robocalls and robotexts aren’t just annoying, _they’re illegal._

Yet every single day, they are used to take advantage of people and scam them out of their hard earned money.

The Attorney General has the power to sue companies that use illegal robocalls and robotexts scams – _and as Pennsylvania’s Attorney General, Eugene DePaquale would do just that!_

But right now, we have to put pressure on leaders to take action to hold these companies accountable for breaking the law.
[**Sign our petition today to demand a STOP to illegal robocalls and robotexts →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871581/417857801/-35000151?refcode=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&utm_campaign=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&source=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmY0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8S0R88Ejj978n2-MTALnHPgrpVxibwE2W-yrdi2z7o=&emci=fee46333-b324-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10203249)
| [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871582/417857802/-35000151?refcode=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&utm_campaign=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&source=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmY0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8S0R88Ejj978n2-MTALnHPgrpVxibwE2W-yrdi2z7o=&emci=fee46333-b324-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10203249)
---
Unwanted calls – including illegal and spoofed robocalls - are the FCC's top consumer complaint. And there’s no wonder why: _Americans received a whopping 225 billion robotexts and 78 billion robocalls in 2022!_

Yet despite the FCC’s efforts, scammers are stealing more money than ever before. Americans lost $65 billion to robocalls in 2022, more than double the amount lost the previous year.

We need an Attorney General who will track down the people and companies behind these illegal robocalls and robotexts and hold them accountable.

**[If you agree, sign our petition demanding a stop to illegal robocalls and robotexts →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871586/417857803/-35000151?refcode=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&utm_campaign=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&source=email_072223_stoprobocalls_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmY0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8S0R88Ejj978n2-MTALnHPgrpVxibwE2W-yrdi2z7o=&emci=fee46333-b324-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d2f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10203249)**

The Attorney General has the power to sue companies that use illegal robocalls and robotexts scams – and as Pennsylvania’s Attorney General, Eugene DePaquale would do just that! But right now, we have to put pressure on leaders to take action to hold these companies accountable for breaking the law. | Unwanted calls – including illegal and spoofed robocalls - are the FCC's top consumer complaint. And there’s no wonder why: Americans received a whopping 225 billion robotexts and 78 billion robocalls in 2022! Yet despite the FCC’s efforts, scammers are stealing more money than ever before. Americans lost $65 billion to robocalls in 2022, more than double the amount lost the previous year. We need an Attorney General who will track down the people and companies behind these illegal robocalls and robotexts and hold them accountable. name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is deeply personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our kids deserve the best possible education here in NC.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871721/417858151/823540626?refcode=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWuyEP1xHuH-KNezm7quSCWXu-UvvOlogBJChXheF1w=&emci=59819c8e-f127-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1049176)
Peter, with everything going on in the news, and while families and kids are enjoying summer break, I don’t want any of us to forget about what’s happening with North Carolina’s public schools: _Republicans are attacking them through all means possible._ They’re trying to cut funding for public education through the budget while plotting to send YOUR public tax dollars to unaccountable private schools. Meanwhile, they want to take over control of what teachers can teach and students can learn as part of their extremist culture war agenda. It’s a betrayal of our kids, Peter, and I won’t stand for it. **[We have to break the GOP supermajorities in Raleigh and elect leaders who will fight FOR public education — not against it. I need you to donate whatever you can to help>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871723/417858155/435245919?refcode=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWuyEP1xHuH-KNezm7quSCWXu-UvvOlogBJChXheF1w=)** Peter, this is a deeply personal issue to me. My mother was one of the best North Carolina public school teachers around. I received excellent education in North Carolina public schools as did all three of our children. **I believe every child deserves an excellent education, no matter where they live or what their parents can afford. And I believe that North Carolina MUST provide that quality of education.** _Republicans clearly aren’t on board with strengthening our public schools and ensuring kids and teachers have access to the resources they need._ But there are strong Democratic candidates all across this state who share our values about education — they just need our support to win. **[Please, give whatever you can to help me work to elect leaders who will fight for kids, teachers, and public schools>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871726/417858157/435245919?refcode=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWuyEP1xHuH-KNezm7quSCWXu-UvvOlogBJChXheF1w=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66871735/417858164/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.c3f4350f-9828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y0MzUwZi05ODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWuyEP1xHuH-KNezm7quSCWXu-UvvOlogBJChXheF1w=)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: We’re not “just asking questions.”
body:
At Courier Newsroom our network of local journalists is committed to calling out misinformation for what it is.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)
Joe Rogan is at it again, Peter. This marks the **third time** we’ve been “featured” on his show, which is one of the most popular in the country.
This week, Rogan took a break from platforming conspiracy theorists like Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to instead host billionaire Marc Andreessen.
In his interview, **Andreessen called our network of local newsrooms “fake news”** — citing a right-wing Super PAC as his source. The Super PAC then immediately tweeted a video from the interview, praising Rogan and Andreessen for “unmasking us” (whatever that means 🙄).
**This is the Joe Rogan model in action**. He says he’s “just asking questions,” but really he’s allowing right-wing bad actors to spread misinformation that gets amplified to millions of people online.
[**At Courier Newsroom, our network of local journalists is committed to calling out misinformation for what it is and providing fact-based reporting on local events. Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can to support our mission and help us fight back against bad actors like Rogan?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=1270_120351_EZz6mC&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=1270_120351_EZz6mC&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)**
Unlike Rogan, we’re not “just asking questions” — **we publish rigorous, fact-based journalism so our readers know the truth about the most important issues in their local communities.**
And thanks to the generous support of our grassroots team, we’re taking that truth directly to “news deserts” that lack other reliable sources of local news. **Plus, none of our work is locked behind a paywall or subscription fee.**
But we can’t do any of our work without your support, Peter.
[**So please, pitch in $5 or any amount you can today to support our newsrooms and help us hold Rogan and anyone else who spreads misinformation accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=1270_120351_EZz6mC&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=1270_120351_EZz6mC&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)**
Thanks,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1270_120351_EZz6mC&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1270%2E120351%2EEZz6mC)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
Discover these 3 simple steps here.

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29766%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=40nylyuamprK3OGyYKCgWw&sysid=1) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1DRNTTvTa7xz4sDji28Cyw&sysid=1) Good luck and God bless! |
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder

Team,

House Democrats are fighting hard to expand workforce development, rebuild the economy, lower inflation, and solve problems for hard-working Americans.

Due to legislation Democrats in Congress have passed, we've seen robust growth in our economy–despite obstacles from Kevin McCarthy and his allies.

**_Democrats have created more than 13.2 million jobs in the last three years, inflation is at a 12-year low of 3%, and wages are up 4% in the last month._**

If we want to continue this steady growth in our economy, pay down our debt, and curb inflation for every hard-working American, it's clear Democrats must take back the House in 2024. And with Marcy Kaptur being one of Kevin McCarthy’s top targets this year, we have to keep our early momentum going strong.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Three reasons to support Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter, Governor Josh Shapiro here.
**[I'm reaching out today to ask if you will chip in a few dollars to Bob Casey's re-election campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230722-1?refcode=em20230722-1&refcode2=339_552475_XnmaIa&akid=339%2E552475%2EXnmaIa)** But first, let me give you three reasons why we all need to support Bob:
1️⃣ Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they couldn’t do here in 2022 -- flip Pennsylvania.
2️⃣ Pennsylvania is one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets in 2024, and national Republicans are prepared to spend an unprecedented amount of money here to win this race.
3️⃣ Our Democratic majority in the Senate is at risk -- and with it, the chance to deliver for PA families at the federal level.
**So, what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in now to support Bob and keep PA blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230722-1?refcode=em20230722-1&refcode2=339_552475_XnmaIa&akid=339%2E552475%2EXnmaIa)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230722-1?refcode=em20230722-1&refcode2=339_552475_XnmaIa&akid=339%2E552475%2EXnmaIa)**
It’s time to show Republicans that Pennsylvania is NOT for sale -- just like we did in 2022.
Thank you,
Josh Shapiro
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230722-1?refcode=em20230722-1&refcode2=339_552475_XnmaIa&akid=339%2E552475%2EXnmaIa)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter, this is disturbing.

Megan Rapinoe said she supports _**biological men**_ playing on the field with the U.S. _**Women’s**_ National Team.

This is an all-out assault on women athletes.

Far-Left activist Megan Rapinoe is a hypocrite. Now that she is retiring, she has no skin in the game. But what about future girls aspiring to have the same opportunities Megan had?

Women deserve a place to play. Plain and simple.

We need your help to defend women’s sports, and that starts with you. Your daughter or granddaughter needs your support NOW before it's too late and they are competing against MEN.

We want to know: [**Do you believe biological men should be eligible to play soccer on the US Women’s National Team?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=5dd6c0aaa14d4af9bb2664a13bc498dc&_e=UtEQRY91SU_lFo4GTF84Fdd9C5oKH_fYTSS8MVAXQXyriASELnAxJL8gtPKbRAHZse6ki6-VrV696mmfzmxXIFn4FQk34TwQfiMNDLBsiFTO3T3FL7-NKV8UZ4JjYi9KYIKoP4aYHGePMN3LA2r2sPQkRV3t3mrRoy1VrUSWL-BoTGZ-dYr9PlWQpJHnA6PDkY599S_kTtxqvOV6VoBEh8L_F8ON-lgJpJUVprfiXw5cInhMcHVtobYsRUiRmp7QUJqEKbOWdQzl3OH9Ebuccc0wl11nchaS1ARY4fMvwgdsnSDogsEYMDnn2eXWD0L0ZTmRw17bq5B8UNF1OhkJvzBsICvF0wKseMH36yy-TzRzhmAe96VsJnrfofAO223J)
