**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling. | | BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND Vivek Ramaswamy - 12% Ron DeSantis - 12% Fellow American - people are waking up. People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement. I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today. But this gives me hope for our future. We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. That's what makes America itself. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. **CMT Pulls Jason Aldean 's Controversial 'Try That In a Small Town' Video: Exclusive**

_Billboard 7.18.23_

---

**This is unbelievable.**

Just yesterday CMT pulled down Jason Aldean's music video to his hit song 'Try That In A Small Town' because it portrayed actual events of protesters screaming, an American flag burning, police getting attacked, and a convenience store getting robbed.

This is what happens when you call out the radical Left's defund the police agenda.

If you haven't seen it, you need to **[check it out here:](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5f9989c74fc9488aa7b9d6aebe69de3c&_e=DdQLqun3tw5Y_OMZNGx_PiWSIZsQVqLOqPnpXGNL5FuvpoA61MasXZcEl-CiCjHqllu_rMTB93HMEAMcL_YwMStWdg2NfGPjboOEr961jA7p62Ud7YEdOUFbfzQhR8bzGJs_nKGvqGWGMwE1Ln_apZ5ttGfVqJrMOZJ4zJ5pQulY302XcQcCq78qqJFpl52MV-i9VXdduLdRtl4XYXONx-Dy6EYYrZKOTgNLCv6Vpq4LbeBZhZotHTv6C8RaIqRsxVxXzk5emjOwt5yhtSQtMsRjCVKGB335EZjo8tAphEpqYrecF5Bz8BemSMLGhggh-PDXcQfrzrtjNowQQ3FFgwKn_P8k1yeYPvtZibPR3WS8PfWSAG5qxUyptr6vEnsH4vYvPPkcoq9DMPX0rkrcZCcEwcWMBq6s3POp8BnemQU%3D "check it out here:")**

**The radical Left is ignoring reality.**

Like Jason Aldean, I am from small-town America where we have a set of traditional values and would not tolerate any American flags burning, stores getting robbed, or police getting attacked.

We were all born and raised to have respect for each other and respect for America, no matter our differences.

These values are being lost as Democrats are more focused on attacking and suppressing anyone who disagrees with them, shining a negative light on our great nation.

It's time we get back to our roots. **[That's why I am personally asking you to rush your support to stand for small-town America.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5f9989c74fc9488aa7b9d6aebe69de3c&_e=DdQLqun3tw5Y_OMZNGx_PiWSIZsQVqLOqPnpXGNL5FuvpoA61MasXZcEl-CiCjHqllu_rMTB93HMEAMcL_YwMStWdg2NfGPjboOEr961jA7p62Ud7YEdOUFbfzQhR8bzGJs_nKGvqGWGMwE1Ln_apZ5ttGfVqJrMOZJ4zJ5pQulY302XcQcCq78qqJFpl52MV-i9VXdduLdRtl4XYXONx-Dy6EYYrZKOTgNLCv6Vpq4LbeBZhZotHTv6C8RaIqRsxVxXzk5emjOwt5yhtSQtMv7bB7KQNVW_BC6Sx8a5J6mX6HUaBWVYP7FoE76CtSiOa_9QmHbpzC-U2RInR081IdVh-wdsuaRMISnQpnjNwAP9Fft7LKwtulXxRcnZ2LbP7y89SOtG-cRu8BUv9YO3LLgyCqQG3rIRH8JQpIh7Rkg%3D "That’s why I am personally asking you to rush your support to stand for small-town America.")**

Just yesterday CMT pulled down Jason Aldean's music video to his hit song 'Try That In A Small Town' because it portrayed actual events of protesters screaming, an American flag burning, police getting attacked, and a convenience store getting robbed. name: Zak Malamed
subject: He isn’t even doing his job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
If we work together to win this campaign and defeat Santos, I will do the job I was elected to do and be the dedicated Representative that this district deserves.
#
After telling countless lies to get to Congress, George Santos swore he would serve us in Washington and put his constituents first.
**Turns out, that was just another lie — take a look at yesterday’s headline:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=333_8507_SeE1Ax&akid=333%2E8507%2ESeE1Ax)
Constituent casework is one of the core duties a member of Congress has. They act as our liaisons with other government agencies, like the IRS, the SBA, and the VA. Through these cases, members can help the people they serve recover their hard earned money, receive their benefits, or even obtain a passport — but Santos has **only** closed **9** of these cases since he took office.
For reference: other members of Congress have closed **over 1,000** cases in the same amount of time _._
Every second that George Santos spends in Congress (not even doing his job) is a second wasted for the people of NY-03 who need an advocate in Washington. **So**** I promise you this:**
[**If we work together to win this campaign and defeat Santos, I will do the job I was elected to do and be the dedicated Representative that this district deserves. In order to do that, we need resources to power our campaign so if you’re able, please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford now:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230722?refcode=em20230722&amount=5&refcode2=333_8507_SeE1Ax&akid=333%2E8507%2ESeE1Ax)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230722?amount=5&refcode=em20230722&refcode2=333_8507_SeE1Ax&akid=333%2E8507%2ESeE1Ax)**
With gratitude,
Zak

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Nine of the most powerful Americans don’t have a code of ethics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
It’s the least we can do.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26859%2E3422442%2E63lcXs)
This week Senate Democrats advanced a bill that would impose a judicial code of ethics on Supreme Court Justices. Derek, it's appalling that nine of the most powerful Americans don't already have a code of ethics!
The proposed law would:
* Bolster financial disclosure requirements (including the reporting of gifts).
* Impose stricter guidelines for Justices recusing themselves in cases where they have a conflict of interest.
* Allow formal complaints to be made against Justices who may have broken the rules, allowing other federal judges to investigate.

This bill is just a start, but even this push for basic transparency is being opposed by Republicans. [**Can you add your name to show support for reforming our Supreme Court and implementing a code of ethics?**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230722-hold-the-supreme-court-accountable/?source=EMAJ22_1_ETH_20230722_V1_F&akid=26859%2E3422442%2E63lcXs)
**[Sign the Petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em20230722-hold-the-supreme-court-accountable/?source=EMAJ22_1_ETH_20230722_V1_F&akid=26859%2E3422442%2E63lcXs)**
In the Senate, Katie would push to hold the Supreme Court accountable. A code of ethics is a start, but we also need to expand the court, enforce term limits, and work to get politics out of our judicial system.
Onward,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ22_1_ETH_20230722_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26859_3422442_63lcXs&akid=26859%2E3422442%2E63lcXs)**

_\- CBS Minnesota_
Friend,
Keith is facing an onslaught of GOP attacks after saying Clarence Thomas needs to be impeached following a string of reports detailing the grotesque financial conflicts of interest between Thomas and Republican mega-donor Harlan Crow.

Wade_ , ending affirmative action, ruling in favor of anti-LGBTQ+ extremists, and siding with powerful special interests over regular people. It’s infuriating.

name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11389%2E9716520%2ER5H2cz)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11389%2E9716520%2ER5H2cz)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJuly/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11389%2E9716520%2ER5H2cz)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11389%2E9716520%2ER5H2cz)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230722-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11389%2E9716520%2ER5H2cz)

| | The GOP just held a hearing on disinformation – not on how to stop it, **_but how to promote it._**

Republican Congressman Jim Jordan invited known anti-vaxxers and conspiracy theorists to testify to the House Judiciary Committee and spread their dangerous lies in the halls of Congress.

The GOP is being clear here: **_they want to force social media companies to spread lies and harmful disinformation.**_

Why are they doing this? Because they know that when Trump becomes the Republican nominee for president, the GOP will go all-in to make sure his baseless lies get as much airtime as possible.

[**_We need to defeat the MAGA GOP and flip control of Congress. That’s the only way that we can stop the GOP from promoting harmful lies and conspiracy theories. Will you pitch in whatever you can afford right now to help us defeat the GOP here in Georgia, flip control of Congress, and stop MAGA Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66875792/417872685/710125701?refcode=20230722.1_PSD_7Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDhlMjA5ZS05ZTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtgLTLQOoZyOiAEbBsUgnb8N8nKRobT7dnim-9oLbHc=)**_

Thank you for your support – together, we WILL defeat the MAGA GOP.

– GA Dems

name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: Will you endorse Tammy today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=648%2E35263%2E8PjfXy)
Peter — We are building a grassroots team that will be the foundation of our campaign to reelect Tammy and keep the Senate Majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands. **Tammy needs to know if you’re all-in to defend this battleground seat — _and our Democratic Senate majority along with it._ [Peter, will you sign on today to personally endorse Tammy’s reelection for Wisconsin’s Senate seat?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/2307_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230722_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=648%2E35263%2E8PjfXy)** | [ENDORSE TAMMY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/2307_endorsetammy?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230722_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=648%2E35263%2E8PjfXy)
---
Elections in Wisconsin are won and lost by narrow margins — and next year’s election could very well be Tammy’s most competitive (and expensive) one to date.
We can’t win this toss-up Senate seat without your help — _especially with TWO Republican mega-millionaires being mentioned as potential opponents in Wisconsin’s Senate race._
Tammy’s proud of this motivated grassroots team that’s by her side in the fight to protect abortion rights, Social Security, Medicare, voting rights, and so much more. But with this competitive reelection campaign ramping up, we’ll need even more folks committed to defending this seat and our Democratic Senate majority.
**[So we need to know: Will you personally endorse Tammy’s reelection campaign today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/2307_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230722_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=648%2E35263%2E8PjfXy)**

Knowing we can count on your support makes all the difference, so thank you for endorsing Tammy’s campaign.

name: Survey Alert via MondaireForCongress.com
subject: RE: Did you see Mondaire’s survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We just need 30 seconds of your time. We promise. Mondaire says it all the time: “policy is personal.” Whether it’s lowering the cost of health care, ending gun violence, or raising wages for working people—there is so much at stake for everyday people.

Team, tomorrow we’ll be going over the responses to our issues survey with Mondaire, and we noticed your submission isn’t complete.

We want to make sure you get a chance to fill out our short survey. Mondaire really cares about your opinion and wants to hear what issues are important to you.

[**Take a moment to fill out Mondaire’s issues survey. Your input will be crucial to this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66876685/417875706/238343455?ms=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&refcode=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&source=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VoDxLnilZarksTwbbaEX2WeirHXcE9S1e/918D5kZAWBDD51Hozi3Sg/eA5WvTElaz2bcaroKhVFwBHCAOSS0DMeYqZSX5LpVs63M7aEslI=&refcode2=b5f9e270-a028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWY5ZTI3MC1hMDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdh4kw41Jx-4X899lA7tE3H501rXET2a9AYmylkKdSs=&emci=8de0d562-dd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=b5f9e270-a028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=24719896)

Thanks for your feedback,

Team Mondaire

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mondaire Jones
Date: Jul 21, 2023
Subject: I can’t run this campaign without your input

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66876690/417875708/238343455?ms=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&refcode=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&source=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230722_kicker_esrv_gq_act_sur_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=VoDxLnilZarksTwbbaEX2WeirHXcE9S1e/918D5kZAWBDD51Hozi3Sg/eA5WvTElaz2bcaroKhVFwBHCAOSS0DMeYqZSX5LpVs63M7aEslI=&refcode2=b5f9e270-a028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWY5ZTI3MC1hMDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdh4kw41Jx-4X899lA7tE3H501rXET2a9AYmylkKdSs=&emci=8de0d562-dd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=b5f9e270-a028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=24719896)
---

Hi team, this grassroots campaign isn’t just about me. It’s about this district; it’s about fighting for what’s right, and most importantly, **it’s about you.**

I’m running to serve the interests of working people, not big campaign donors. But to do that, I need to know what issues are at the top of your mind. In a perfect world, I’d be able to talk to each and every voter about the issues they care most about, but that’s just not possible. So, I’m reaching out the best way I know how: by coming to your inbox and asking what’s on your mind.

clean_body: We just need 30 seconds of your time. We promise. Mondaire says it all the time: “policy is personal.” Whether it’s lowering the cost of health care, ending gun violence, or raising wages for working people—there is so much at stake for everyday people. Team, tomorrow we’ll be going over the responses to our issues survey with Mondaire, and we noticed your submission isn’t complete. We want to make sure you get a chance to fill out our short survey. Mondaire really cares about your opinion and wants to hear what issues are important to you. Thanks for your feedback, Team Mondaire \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mondaire Jones Date: Jul 21, 2023 Subject: I can’t run this campaign without your input | Hi team, this grassroots campaign isn’t just about me. It’s about this district; it’s about fighting for what’s right, and most importantly, it’s about you. I’m running to serve the interests of working people, not big campaign donors. But to do that, I need to know what issues are at the top of your mind. In a perfect world, I’d be able to talk to each and every voter about the issues they care most about, but that’s just not possible. So, I’m reaching out the best way I know how: by coming to your inbox and asking what’s on your mind. I’m looking forward to reading your responses. —Mondaire = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS

That’s why I continue to say that the 2024 election will truly be the final battle for the heart and soul of our nation. Friend, I know in my heart that we will prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and emerge victorious on November 5, 2024 as We The People peacefully take back our country and Make America Great Again! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people running our country right now, then don’t even think about donating. Though, I will request that you say a prayer for me and my family, and most importantly, for our nation. But, if you can chip in, you already know the stakes of the 2024 election. It’s a question of whether we still have a Free Republic or whether America has begun its tragic descent into tyranny. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a56b423c44544f81bee984fd467cd3a6&_e=l3ptHU8Q3pj3VI_qK4JaUp7TF26gMDU0doLc2wYswpoF0uZBl7x5epATqqFjX8coNBzFIDniypxkhnE-GJ7BQBY6QFuDyRFZ9YzvlkhBaImhMOQiHv66THqgOMeydDIN1tJLsT4jHc4cOpGo9DYW40dSUNgl9s3Ws0yP6BPDglNqmlBFhT-WibB0Z2FMg7obz0Nxgrnxo624qPVhgHRxpFtqcc9mFkkD2-32oyjSUBrA-6JV7umijqVZwy5xOX1vH4uRfqoyq1daGV_lZ-bn7A%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a56b423c44544f81bee984fd467cd3a6&_e=l3ptHU8Q3pj3VI_qK4JaUp7TF26gMDU0doLc2wYswpoF0uZBl7x5epATqqFjX8coNBzFIDniypxkhnE-GJ7BQBY6QFuDyRFZ9YzvlkhBaImhMOQiHv66THqgOMeydDINmNrVxx4EId0RbFdl8nDZwnDrmpMjr_zPqij3Ck4aIM8rr5PY-ydIWiB6xt5g4RheYnYv-U08Lyym6oOfjuerArt1ErSl-EYpJTf8A5udAcIRR64i4uM6pIDgSVgvxkqUYZTAm508shGknsYO7f8Eiw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a56b423c44544f81bee984fd467cd3a6&_e=l3ptHU8Q3pj3VI_qK4JaUp7TF26gMDU0doLc2wYswpoF0uZBl7x5epATqqFjX8coNBzFIDniypxkhnE-GJ7BQBY6QFuDyRFZ9YzvlkhBaImhMOQiHv66THqgOMeydDIN-UHjrzDfKzEPJuedxKtULmD5Pv4kbXGcGKgTWtAQYDm8x9gHPb32e4S7QStA9g1csOkivUyN-82gFfczuji-65C8CSdoWRN3slpAE2HwufzvJVFyKZBn1cdVUIcZ9omHsj1fsLM-2jHaeYOfyeWuFw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a56b423c44544f81bee984fd467cd3a6&_e=l3ptHU8Q3pj3VI_qK4JaUp7TF26gMDU0doLc2wYswpoF0uZBl7x5epATqqFjX8coNBzFIDniypxkhnE-GJ7BQBY6QFuDyRFZ9YzvlkhBaImhMOQiHv66THqgOMeydDINQRJu6FVy43Ina3L0CzOjAC_hpDiNl5SAkTuHoOcStwZnXRiqEdRqV_f1fuc4rcEJtfLvk5sxosOjPVPSsXav7zbj_to859Nr2vNuoURyLkfrYUdT89LutDQDjUjWXQuH8ZZp9C2FbNu6P28VJ2Qt_g%3D%3D)

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed...
body:
Defeating George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b70b873-ccf7-43b4-ac5d-3399d68b84f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T265ecc96-821c-4cd7-bfb0-f0a34598a41e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6dae3483-40d4-4c53-834d-d584b01b9c13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5329a57-e099-4469-9acb-7fc2f1bfe084/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc711129d-6785-4e42-bd2a-f8291b8e4ce3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b057567-a239-4d46-a8df-9a098e44b19d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c2b4eb0-4d85-460c-a0d1-deb057753e75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8936d9c-ea7a-494b-966a-14ecf4393021/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_90do_annakaplan_23072216?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T487790d3-b06e-43d1-b6ef-0fb67b1240aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1s1rmfno9k6imtcqp6jafsstrl89g89koc2sn60_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im4ob6cph2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4hktvj5a2v36m1hc245c5a1r57tg9dmki75kjo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im4ob6cph2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zct0ulauj29u0brkia62n85adu0uo7jctopvjvl8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im4ob6cph2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

Kash Patel

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AyE9skqaFMUkWicezuHlaA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AyE9skqaFMUkWicezuHlaA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29776%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QX4psoou6qzLk5LMNkXS%2fw&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Electing principled Republicans to join me in Carson City and turning the Silver State RED!

clean_body: The House passed a resolution denying Israeli government racist apartheid. | | | Friend, As the Israeli government escalates violence against Palestinians with our tax dollars, we urgently need more Members of Congress to hold the Israeli government accountable and speak up for Palestinians’ human rights. This week, freshman Congresswoman Summer Lee was among the few Democrats to vote NO on a dangerous resolution denying Israel’s racist apartheid policies and reaffirming unconditional support of the Israeli government despite its human rights abuses. For her vote, Summer has faced attacks by right-wing leaders who want to maintain the unjust status quo. Her action takes political courage, especially since AIPAC’s network of PACs spent $4 million trying to defeat Summer last year as she ran for Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Summer Lee and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Jul 21, 2022 Subject: we must urgently hold the Israeli government accountable: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, the House of Representatives passed a resolution denying Israel’s racist apartheid and reaffirming unconditional support of the Israeli government despite its increasing human rights abuses. With Israel’s government escalating violence against Palestinians, this is a dangerous move at a time when we must urgently hold Israel’s leaders accountable. For too long, Congress has been complicit in funding apartheid. But we’re building a movement of progressives who understand the crisis that Palestinians are facing, and who don’t look away. Rep. Summer Lee was among the few Democrats to vote NO on this week’s resolution , saying: “We are not true allies if we cannot push our partners to uphold basic human rights & democratic values. I cannot vote for unconditional support of any nation-state.” Summer Lee is standing up for human rights for all people, without exception. This takes political courage, especially as a freshman Member of Congress who faced $4 million in attacks from AIPAC’s network of PACs when running for Congress last year. Now that she’s in office, Summer is prioritizing the needs of the people over corporate greed, fighting for environmental and racial justice. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s absolutely abhorrent - 60% of all children who set out to cross the border have been caught by cartels and are being abused in human trafficking. Wide open borders entice and invite traffickers to come right in. It’s disgusting - and the Left refuses to do anything about it. There’s only one way to stop trafficking in America: secure our border and hold cartels and criminals accountable. While the previous administration did everything it could to secure our border, Joe Biden has no interest in even trying to address this crisis. It’s almost like he’s purposefully ignoring the border because he knows conservatives are right about the tragedy going on there. Combating human trafficking should be a bipartisan issue, but instead, the Left has chosen to ignore it under the guise of open borders. I will ALWAYS stand for the innocent children at the mercy of cartels and smugglers, and I know you will too. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Team AOC
subject: We have a Republican challenger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Getting ready for 2024
#
We debated whether or not to send this email.
When it comes to campaigning, our motto has always been to focus on our record, and not give any extreme right-wing opponents any free publicity.
But even if we don’t talk about them much, the reality is we have to take our Republican challengers seriously. In 2020, Alexandria was in the second most expensive House race in the country. Her challenger raised and spent more than $10 million against her. And even when our challengers don’t win, the disinformation they sow can discredit our movement if we don’t fight back.
Now, we officially have a challenger for 2024, and she's starting to fundraise.
[We’re now asking if you will contribute $5 today to support Alexandria and ensure we have the resources to win next year? When thousands of people give what they can, it shows the power of this movement.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230722.O8X1eu&refcode=em20230722-4676-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)
Here are a few facts about our opponent:
* **She paid George Santos a lot of money to consult on the last election.** In 2022, she paid George Santos’ consulting firm $110,320 and hers was the only campaign to ever report working with the firm.
* **Her campaign may have been part of a scam run by George Santos.** A donor who gave to Santos had their credit card charged for additional, unauthorized donations — including two maxed-out $2,900 contributions to her campaign. 1
* She participated in the **January 6 Insurrection rally.**
* **She is associated with the white supremacist Proud Boys** and proudly posted a photo of herself with their leaders.

We know that communities in The Bronx, Queens, and across the country support our message and want AOC to stay in Congress – but we need to show it by making sure Alexandria wins again by a considerable margin.
[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today? Every dollar helps us reach more voters to ensure that we have the resources to reach voters all across New York’s 14th district so Alexandria wins by a HUGE margin next year.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230722.O8X1eu&refcode=em20230722-4676-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230722.O8X1eu&refcode=em20230722-4676-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)**
Together we can keep winning and send Alexandria back to Congress for another term to keep fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice for all.
Thank you for being with us,
Team AOC
1 - [talkingpointsmemo.com/muckraker/george-santos-tina-forte-flag-credit-card-charges](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19176?t=22&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230722?refcode=em20230722-4676-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=4676_2526796_YDdwpz&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230722-4676-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4676%2E2526796%2EYDdwpz)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Radical liberals have gone too far, my friend... Israeli President Isaac Herzog addressed Congress earlier this week, but members of The Squad — including Ilhan Omar — were not there. Instead of showing support for one of America's closest allies, Omar and her fellow Squad members were criticizing and attacking Israel and our relationship with them. Rep. Pramila Jayapal even went as far as to call Israel a "racist state." **I'm sorry, but that couldn't be further from the truth**. As one of our most strategic allies, Israel has helped America work toward stability and security across the globe. The Squad's positions are so out-of-touch, even their fellow Democrats are criticizing them! **I believe that America should stand with our allies to strengthen our national security, not tear them down and call them racist.** **[If you agree, chip in $5 right now to help me continue fighting for America's national security>>](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=890fed4c711c41e6b493c13fb2826f20&_e=JJ5nj8hOOWa0jyzKxQZXJPLGAMNcv-GdFFi6OsfpYRNT5WOEe5d2OxFK3lxCKDZ3eQs1QuhAmMxreUO49LWbymFX0hvaXND9P87qw8pvdkUCTNKJU0169hU3tbNoLnK7p2PvhpPQ3wW3ZsTfZTUoeiYUFev5oX01tYOLyq6iFDEKwyKBU2_2dcf74HCPx2syj795vuGNpRgKNh4KcDTv1bbf1BflY6hkKfIcd_Ec18VZ5dovZTmLf-SCa379ER74)**

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=62c11c7a137d47e3880f1b38a9159eb5&_e=BtVVhdfXpttnatJwrvm4bfSy0bXezfXJJXcBAAqJIhzBGHX4VOBw-TAni8wn-yeA9XLuqxIRtTixZvn5ppGcaqfdPYpjdyrcRh0JJMsnBn1SIwRiInJwx1ZKux7RMx8X0TfBlmwyO-sgcEj-ML4AAOz50iKBm51x6RM5TRL1TKEU_mTeT2XC-Io07ocYBgzem1KtNRVsOAdjZvuGyyjpOIxa2MFJmCeqD2Fp_REAat03KY3tAL_jEC3_Sfj7uZnSoteCaFdARDrbIKoqVZnNkEMs8ssdQ3mfRxJikVXq7EXuXOe_AdGId9VldE9aNJf6xwSVLZzfOB9vro64wEtIBrhNoOxcF56dRFQ-C6dJ-iL-lUj45XuvsXii4_VNVB65j93Gh4i19qPJxDDktOHmEC2-EThR2XBwyxAez3B8eFk%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=62c11c7a137d47e3880f1b38a9159eb5&_e=BtVVhdfXpttnatJwrvm4bfSy0bXezfXJJXcBAAqJIhzBGHX4VOBw-TAni8wn-yeA9XLuqxIRtTixZvn5ppGcaqfdPYpjdyrcRh0JJMsnBn1SIwRiInJwx1ZKux7RMx8X0TfBlmwyO-sgcEj-ML4AAOz50iKBm51x6RM5TRL1TKEU_mTeT2XC-Io07ocYBgzem1KtNRVsOAdjZvuGyyjpOIxa2MFJmCeqD2Fp_REAat03KY3tAL_jEC3_Sfj7uZnSFlfewdbIX9njnVtAwFZwFaU9gqDf_g5_qxpJE5H0FnOFsMh8wM0rAnXWSkkR3hiajJfrxSsPHfT1F_BE47ghIjemrbQOrdido87Kw933V4-r4suws3svrh2P6UdzTaxBeX0_T-G8NL1qHs8TS86KT_-atQJvqNzD65R0QCAIUgA%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=62c11c7a137d47e3880f1b38a9159eb5&_e=BtVVhdfXpttnatJwrvm4bfSy0bXezfXJJXcBAAqJIhzBGHX4VOBw-TAni8wn-yeA9XLuqxIRtTixZvn5ppGcaqfdPYpjdyrcRh0JJMsnBn1SIwRiInJwx1ZKux7RMx8X0TfBlmwyO-sgcEj-ML4AAOz50iKBm51x6RM5TRL1TKEU_mTeT2XC-Io07ocYBgzem1KtNRVsOAdjZvuGyyjpOIxa2MFJmCeqD2Fp_REAat03KY3tAL_jEC3_Sfj7uZnSbsK2_8vSc-UXeLwJ7It2XgeS5zGvsfQ4EUFoLUkvcvIiLp-O4mfyFoA7rVXaJAByj8k_BG-5TsZR_I4Al2h5s9HJlG3ccChJyln6B0FkGw2XBc6wy5QDwqEtbBmD-K81nFsEKlzTUMCAcYFZZ8UbVvuT_U4up18rrUThleifDg4%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. name: Team Pramila
subject: The power of your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Your voice matters, and we want to hear from you.
#
Peter,
We're now well into the third quarter of the year and Pramila is taking bold, progressive action in Congress for our values. Back here at Team Pramila HQ, we're taking some time to realign our goals to amplify our collective voice and continue driving our campaign to be successful for the rest of the year.
In order to succeed we will need the most important factor to our campaign: you. **That's why we're asking you to take our Quarter Three Official Priorities Survey.**[**The survey will only take five minutes or less to complete. But your input will help us better understand what we want Pramila to focus on and how we can better fight for our progressive vision.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230722-2726&t=1&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)
**[Take our survey ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230722-2726&t=2&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)**
Pramila is dedicated and determined to continue showing up for her constituents, and communities like hers. Whether that is centered around issues like climate change, social justice, racial injustice, or healthcare, Pramila is ready to bring our voices to the halls of Congress to ensure that our issues are front and center, and our democracy doesn't leave a single person behind.
Unlike our competitors that focus only on their personal greed, Pramila understands the impact of collaborative action and our collective power. The only way a grassroots movement like ours can be successful is by working together to fight for solutions to the issues our country faces day in and day out.
A better tomorrow starts with fixing the issues of today, Peter, and that can only happen by listening to those who experience them and fighting for a better future. [**If you want your voice heard as part of a movement designed to suit your needs, please take the time to fill out this quick survey.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-q3-priorities-survey/?source=em20230722-2726&t=3&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230722-2726-footer&t=4&refcode2=2726_420207_ddmrNK&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2726%2E420207%2EddmrNK)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
You'll hear heartwarming accounts of how people came together, had fun, celebrated freedom, and Mr. Kennedy will join the call to answer several questions as well.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=1)

Dear Kennedy Supporters, On July 24th at 6:00pm PT / 9:00pm ET, Mr. Kennedy will host a live broadcast with supporters all across the nation. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/july24_heal_the_divide?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=2) **1\. We have[over 60 in-person gatherings you can join](https://www.kennedy24.com/kennedy24events?page=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=3) on the [Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/july24_heal_the_divide?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=4) website, and it’s not too late for you to set one up if there’s not one in your local community**. 2\. We suggest that groups gather in person from 4:30 to 7:30pm Pacific / 7:30 to 10:30pm Eastern. 3\. **Team Kennedy will go live at 6:00 pm Pacific / 9:00 pm Eastern** ; we will see groups on the Zoom call who participated in parades across the country on July 4. 4\. You'll hear heartwarming accounts of how people came together, had fun, celebrated freedom, and Mr. Kennedy will join the call to answer several questions as well. The event location only needs to have internet access and can show a Zoom call on a laptop or screen. The hosts who log an in-person event on [Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=H4AkTvuCfbpHXXd0j-FNWtCvTEF6EhG25FyMJLR8mTw&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=5) will get an exclusive Zoom link (emailed out on July 24th) to show in their homes or gathering locations where Mr. Kennedy will be live. Bring your friends or neighbors; getting together in person is how we are going to heal our country and reclaim democracy. Post your event on the [Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/july24_heal_the_divide?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heal&n=6) website event page today! clean_body: Our opponent has the fundraising edge — Shawn needs your support more than EVER! FIRST: Shawn Wilson announced his candidacy for Governor to fight for working Louisianans and tackle our state’s toughest obstacles. THEN: Donald Trump endorsed Shawn’s opponent, instantly propelling him to the front of the GOP pack and helping him secure a spot as the top fundraiser in the race. NOW: Shawn is GAINING in the polls, but he needs major grassroots support to take on his opponent and their MAGA money machine. Since we have less than 4 months left in the race,every single dollar we receive will make a difference in Shawn’s chances at victory. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for chipping in! \- Wilson for Louisiana = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
Discover these 3 simple steps here.

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztikfqhm84sqcis9ghpocmhboihca9o8p23flij0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32c1h2bs) you can take to safeguard your savings. A memo was LEAKED revealing that RINO special-interest donors are legitimately HOPING that I get put in JAIL for 400 YEARS so that they can install a puppet nominee who will make amends with the Deep State.
But now, it's no longer only being whispered about in private. Now, they're PUBLICLY ADMITTING it.

If they'd stab someone in the back who helped get them elected - all while our nation is on the brink of tyranny - then how could you _ever_ trust them to defend YOU?
Right now, RINOs are concocting a $370 MILLION scheme to try and defeat me so that they can install their own nominee who has now **PUBLICLY** decided to align with the Deep State.

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6mnode67vf468krg4fe8tq54eueekc6cj272o8o_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk20chnu51laiptmtloehu4phi7fhald4icj8qq8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8o91trd4m8eg3882067ss8j6lr8ac5dlmas3fe0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn3fq8cq1naag1efkob2r1ttc3aak7ml85kifqi8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0558l46em3qoh4p79cgfsn2blfp0ukmuafps6i8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhlp5jrhfls8h3i5clkbvqkq4cnokh47l5lt4b08_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl7s4q14phqc4h59gq2q8ih9es3lnmcam7l2tv28_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze1hr5v8059pmdo2c4hev41sa8t37pulcajd02o0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zov5v5nsd3iq0qo5rh0lk91j4s954p0lhngnq2s8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl5jr5i8ab6buio274u29fuelkr8edc8aoht6uuo_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zffb587c6kmgnv06q99ubu8c93etb0vefestsi50_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcp85dd0cjmtp9go46fpchheku4l9ibrdabfsa70_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zel6r5rqqhst4c6rjaeto8u05dnifju3qa034hsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuofi6j1pkf5rsmoa7tab4tgms738svh10irgdb0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztbenkpr4v8im6j6j53c6bqrjvpq0spo990scklg_rp22sh2s8i66p70c1im6o32cdh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Pro Life Update

As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: It’s not just patients traveling farther for reproductive care.
body:
Students are being forced to travel long distances to get reproductive care training, too. |
---

| | | | In the year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ 16 states have banned abortion—including Texas—making reproductive care harder to access across the country. Women living in those states who are able to do so have had to travel to other states to get the care they need. **In fact, roughly 1,400 Texans seeking abortions travel out of state every month for the care they need, and on average, they have to travel 542 miles to get it.** And many more are not able to travel out of state for care. It is not just patients who are affected in this way. Medical students in states with abortion bans are facing similar challenges. They have to travel to states where abortion is legal to receive proper training in a clinical setting.
---
I’m working in Congress to make sure we train the next generation of health care providers on a full range of reproductive health care. **I introduced a bill with Congressman Ami Bera, M.D. (D-CA) that would create a grant program for students, residents, and advanced clinicians to get the training they need in states where abortion is legal—even if they are studying in a state where it is not.**
[_**Will you join me in this fight for reproductive rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66881680/417894916/-1847009630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk3MDE3Ny1hYTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-WbJKuwKODABud1StaV3023RUODOIGnJREZU4XjWzw=&emci=ee38c9ab-9c28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=17970177-aa28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=30230943)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66881681/417894917/-1847009630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk3MDE3Ny1hYTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-WbJKuwKODABud1StaV3023RUODOIGnJREZU4XjWzw=&emci=ee38c9ab-9c28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=17970177-aa28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=30230943)
---
Of course, I’m also working to ensure patients can access reproductive care, too. I reintroduced my bill with Congresswoman Marilyn Strickland (D-WA) and Congresswoman Cori Bush (D-MO) to provide round-trip financial support—for travel, lodging, meals, child care, and more—to patients who have to travel out of state for abortion care. And earlier this year, I reintroduced my bill protecting the right to travel itself. [_**We must work together to protect the equality, dignity, and freedom of American women—including the right to travel for the care we need, when we need it. Will you join me in this work? Add your name here. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66881682/417894918/-1847009630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk3MDE3Ny1hYTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-WbJKuwKODABud1StaV3023RUODOIGnJREZU4XjWzw=&emci=ee38c9ab-9c28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=17970177-aa28-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=30230943) Together, we can do anything,
---

clean_body: Students are being forced to travel long distances to get reproductive care training, too. | | | | | In the year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, 16 states have banned abortion—including Texas—making reproductive care harder to access across the country. Women living in those states who are able to do so have had to travel to other states to get the care they need. In fact, roughly 1,400 Texans seeking abortions travel out of state every month for the care they need, and on average, they have to travel 542 miles to get it. And many more are not able to travel out of state for care. It is not just patients who are affected in this way. Medical students in states with abortion bans are facing similar challenges. They have to travel to states where abortion is legal to receive proper training in a clinical setting. I’m working in Congress to make sure we train the next generation of health care providers on a full range of reproductive health care. I introduced a bill with Congressman Ami Bera, M.D. (D-CA) that would create a grant program for students, residents, and advanced clinicians to get the training they need in states where abortion is legal—even if they are studying in a state where it is not. | Of course, I’m also working to ensure patients can access reproductive care, too. I reintroduced my bill with Congresswoman Marilyn Strickland (D-WA) and Congresswoman Cori Bush (D-MO) to provide round-trip financial support—for travel, lodging, meals, child care, and more—to patients who have to travel out of state for abortion care. And earlier this year, I reintroduced my bill protecting the right to travel itself. Together, we can do anything, | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC. Don't want to receive these emails anymore?

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Torres=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Your Weekend Outdoor Adventure Needs Your Help!
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidtorres4congress/together-we-can-make-a-difference-9387510?e=56e02d6e28)
---
[](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=dd8f6946d1&e=56e02d6e28)
[](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=f17191af19&e=56e02d6e28)
Happy weekend!
If you're like me, you're probably planning to soak up the beautiful Colorado outdoors today. But as you head outside, I want you to consider the record-breaking heatwaves currently sweeping across our nation.
In the southern states, relentless temperatures above 110°F have become the harsh reality, with Phoenix, Arizona suffering through an unprecedented three weeks of scorching heat above 110°F. Scientists predict that July 2023 may be the hottest month in hundreds, if not thousands, of years.
Let's not take for granted the beautiful weekends outdoors. If climate change continues unchecked, days like today could become fewer and far between.
The choices we make and the leaders we support today will determine whether our children and grandchildren can enjoy the same natural wonders that we do. Sadly, many of our current lawmakers are prioritizing fossil fuel industries over the health of our planet, threatening the future of these precious outdoor moments.
**I am committed to fighting climate change. **
We've set a goal to raise $5000 by the end of July. Whether you can donate $5, $10, or $20, every dollar makes a real difference.
Please consider [**making a donation**](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=424ab2aaf4&e=56e02d6e28) today, while you're out enjoying the beauty of Colorado. Your support can help ensure that future generations will have just as many perfect outdoor days to look forward to.
Together, we can elect leaders who prioritize our planet's health over profits and preserve the natural beauty of Colorado for generations to come.
Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight.
Best,
|

name: Sherrod Brown HQ
subject: BREAKING: New GOP opponent enters neck-and-neck race in Ohio!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
BREAKING: NEW GOP OPPONENT ENTERS OHIO SENATE RACE AGAINST SHERROD BROWN
Sherrod needs your grassroots support now more than ever!
This news couldn't have come at a worse time, folks:
After The Cook Political Report called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat.
With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win. That’s why we just set a $30k rapid-response goal to make sure we have the resources to defend this must-win seat, and we need your help to get there by midnight:

Friend, As you may have seen in the news recently, a proposed rule in New York City would regulate shops using coal-fired pizza ovens in the name of defeating climate change. Before we know it, a policy like this could soon be coming to pizzerias _all across New Jersey_. Before that happens, we want to hear from you, friend:

subject: We were out-raised by David Schweikert.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66882741/417899839/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIxYmU3ZWMtYWUyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o4yBNwSH-2t6yOUDB18KWTMu9W5nvIYwEhHjxfSM35g=)
I'll cut to the chase, friend.

In June, we faced the biggest test of our campaign to date – the first FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign.

Thanks to you, we sent a message to the pundits, and our opponent David Schweikert, that we’re a movement to take seriously. We raised an impressive $300,000 _in just six weeks,_ with 88% of our contributions coming in from Arizona and more than half from within AZ-01.

**We just learned Schweikert raised a little less than double the amount we did, thanks to big donations from special interests and his allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy.**

The good news is that he had the full three months to hit this number, but it means we have a bit of ground to make up. That’s why we’ve set a weekend goal of $5,000 to catch up.

That’s where you come in:

**[We are just a little short of where we need to be. So, if you’re ready to stop David Schweikert, chip in a donation of $3 today to help us pick up the pace and hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66882742/417899840/-898110066?refcode=em-7.22.23-nopnrs-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGIxYmU3ZWMtYWUyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o4yBNwSH-2t6yOUDB18KWTMu9W5nvIYwEhHjxfSM35g=)**
