clean_body: | = I'll cut to the chase, friend. In June, we faced the biggest test of our campaign to date – the first FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign. Thanks to you, we sent a message to the pundits, and our opponent David Schweikert, that we’re a movement to take seriously. We raised an impressive $300,000 in just six weeks, with 88% of our contributions coming in from Arizona and more than half from within AZ-01. We just learned Schweikert raised a little less than double the amount we did, thanks to big donations from special interests and his allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy. The good news is that he had the full three months to hit this number, but it means we have a bit of ground to make up. That’s why we’ve set a weekend goal of $5,000 to catch up. That’s where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. I know we can do this. Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . clean_body: | Heyyy friend, Paw-leased to meet you. My name is Obi-Wan Kenobi (Obi for short), and my dad is Congressman Jared Moskowitz! = My dad and his team have been working their tails off to pass legislation for people like you (and dogs like me). And I’m SO proud of him — but things have been a bit ruff: My dad keeps talking about hitting his fundraising goals?? I’m just a dog, so I don’t know what that means, but it sounds important. Campaigning and working hard in Washington means less time for fetch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Woof woof, Obi Campaign Dog | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single existing majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help elect state Democrats now. **By chipping in _today,_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

clean_body: | Friend, making plans to watch the Barbie movie this weekend? Here at Fight Like Hell PAC, we’re proudest of this Barbie. She’s fighting like hell to protect your fundamental rights — and she could use your help. = Barbie is known for wearing many different hats — just like Governor Gretchen Whitmer. Gretchen is a fierce defender of reproductive rights, a champion for gun safety legislation, a fighter for working families, and an advocate for candidates across the country running to fight like hell for people like us. But she cannot do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** = | = = | = = Together, let’s show the world that women can stand tall, strong, and unyielding in their pursuit for justice — and yes, even in pink! name: Trent Staggs
subject: Big Updates for Volunteers!
body:
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskLtu9CAQRp8GSoubgS0o_uJ3kUhZJdoo6VYDjDEWvsQmWu3bR94qRdrR0Rl9J1xzdPw8ppf58vGkCn6KUY6X_280Oq6V9UjRcX1iTLWKtRQnyOVa7yu6ANMKOc2_bodMKw9RBh5DYC1Kjdx4w32ggxM-Ws16G9D7HnvtlYI29BKVtRp9oNkJJiQzQnDDpGgbKbjsITLgRjFrBFFsSk3dcK57hZT2JiwTLW6odd2J_EdER0S312WDhE1allQQ1vzAiOimPe1z3IjoWHv_2srrcPseRrCn57t9Px8AxgxEdMdyZfAEvDdSSi6lCgY0NuucaFke1f5S0M3F9ZZLybs2RLF0pDme_wQAAP__jmFycg]

Hey Peter,

This is Trent Staggs, your future U.S. Senator! Things are heating up on the campaign trail and I know you don’t wanna miss a
thing, so here’s a quick update about what’s been going on. Last weekend I was invited by Charlie Kirk to attend the Turning Point
Action [https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxckD1r8zAUhX-NtTlcfViSBw3v8GZooaElpd2CviLLyLJrKQT_--J0KV2f-3AP59hLdAqfxvCSzx9PLPlPMtLx_P8NOYU5k8YjrzDvAVjHoEN-0jFd6rZ4ZfW06BjyL7Y_48xoRy121kLnKfdYGIGNRYMy0knWS8MtFcKAoUZK7ulVCM961wsUFQFCQRCCBVDSHSjB9KodaCwYSEEaBlM41NXnWqoOoRzsPKGkhlqX0tB_DTk25PjnvpPbmmMO7TLHXNtb0a3Pbl6LL-1Dbn_shhxRmh-bQLd9rel1uN-GUcv-eZPvJ7Qqt9xjSrFw0TAIe_E94TsAAP__7j1pJA] Summit in Florida. I was able to speak right before
Vivek Ramaswamy and spoke about why Utah deserves a Senator who truly represents the people of Utah. As I talk to more Utahns, one
thing has become extremely clear: this state is crying out for a senator who understands that we are at a turning point in
American history. And this “business as usual” mindset is no longer going to cut it.

Recently I was also fortunate enough to be on the Mark Levin program [https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxMkEFLwzAYhn9NcixfvqRJeshB0IGKDmUyPY00ydqUtOvWdKX_XurJ6_PCA-_jTtEbtu-a9-FwfBEpfGPHu8PTJ_WGSaHrQINhsgIQpYCSht7GdMrrGIyz_WhjM_xjm0yK2nrumHcOysBlYKpWrHa0NRUXLlQBgwal8Oy0sqUE7muQWqAUNBoE5KAQmQKOZcGR8bP1YJkSoBUSAX1T5FsY8pRt00yFu_Q0mTbncSL8geCO4G5ZlmK9zHmuw7ZvxGbXEr67E_54fLtXcxyuP88TTZe_AFCu11v6aJe57ayuXlf9tac348clphQnqYiAZnu56X4DAAD__6CbYHE] and am very
proud to announce that I received his endorsement. While I am proud of all of these endorsements, the endorsement I am most proud
of is YOUR endorsement. Sure, endorsements from big names in conservative media are great, but volunteers like you are the
backbone of any successful campaign. When we win this race, we are going to win because of our volunteers. As I tour the state and
deliver my message, I would love to see you in person. We will be calling every volunteer we can in the region we are stopping at
so that we can get you some signs and Team Staggs gear!

If you have any questions for me or my campaign please feel free to call or text 801-430-2046.

Thank you,

Trent

If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskctu2zAQRb-G2tUghw9RCy2COgLaAklTuGjaTcDHhKJLygopx_DfF7K7cIFuLy7uHJxxL9H37HEfHqbdj88i4TPs-X53_63xPVNCW2ywZ6qjVEhBZYPZxPSynGfsncmziWG6ydYxJazx3DHvHJXIFbLWtsy6ZuyVVZa1nTBeSaktl1pTJqzsOuaZF7qJPVDgtAVgLeUgNxwYfzWeGtYKqlsgguawWQpOS11MCHXjDrlJ_bgscyX8jsBAYKhY3qPDusk11MmXtURguHBWAoM9xuSxEBiOUz3a6kq0-OE94onAQOX5raSn8XQc90Z3X876-yOB4Rx_s_Frza_c1fDx5xtu85bw6ybhWz-fYkqxqpaAFDSs8fWsWjDPySyrHMK3_-pxzPiLHk9AZazVhL-9B9yVJ1Hu7g8otYnp0-7Xc5MOl3_9D7Ep_Q3DDcGfAAAA___vj5ui],
Trent Staggs for Senate

subject: Being a Navy SEAL isn’t a one-man job

body:

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=569e4cb81c05425ba0021cb64ba02f01&_e=mtZnP3hIo1HdQg90dUmnPRGsTNaFK0QgCmI9BM-sqvb7TDScyuu5H82abktmtCb7xcBo7WLyezu-WtpVq3yj9gfnBNnrXTFoEfVPTxVYn3N39TlPpmRbphMTzJqAFgKQvqbtWpRp432e5UjkuVNHMkZ0prmQmE12px4eM7QYt7g7LnJyCPtJF-hYoRcixCMrWhcU5BXvThTZLraKjs8ZDOSCJVEPLYHMnP2LqvE4oqtjT3VFZzr1hEwxKRdvUcgyaEITLzCUmEyB2vAkzk_zmucqu88wb66gEYa7-R-5adgnG-y5BwzOzmwvQys1MnMo2jaBv5PcLjFDfyru_xRm1AWr_vU9ECerilKjWFvdvnxQ5CvG49hz_WV1I1cETsq5QhNhT-O_tUFzunbvPDi7uQ%3D%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

Patriot, It's Oversight Chairman James Comer with another huge development in the Biden Crime Family investigation. **The IRS confirmed I can get the Biden family 's foreign bank records!!** It's clear that the Democrats in Congress know just how damaging the IRS Whistleblower testimony was to the Biden's.
* Following the lead of **MSNBC 's Chief Propagandist JEN PSAKI**, the Democrats accused me of being co-opted by a foreign agent.

* When they pulled their heads out from the sand to ask questions, not only did they show a disturbing lack of curiosity into the Biden family corruption, they even found a way to make the **BIDEN FAMILY CORRUPTION** about.... **PRESIDENT TRUMP!**

* Then Failed Impeachment Flack and now Congressman DAN GOLDMAN tried his best to discredit the Whistleblowers, but ended up confirming **JOE BIDEN** _did discuss_ **HUNTER BIDEN 'S** foreign business deals with him.

Radical Democrats and their allies in the liberal media are spewing lies about me to anyone who will listen. Accusing me of being co-opted by a foreign agent isn't just a blatant and intentional lie: **it 's downright dangerous.** _**Someone should tell them that country boys from West Kentucky don't back down from a fight, and we don't take kindly to liars and bullies.**_

subject: I’ve had enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66886104/417911646/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg2YjgzZi1iODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBJd6IFNZR2ZGO2YBy3_ZcnRmmVqwVNbI2EwITTd1D4=)
Hello Peter, this is Mark Pocan -- Member of Congress from Wisconsin’s 2nd District and co-chair of the Congressional LGBT Equality Caucus.

Sometimes the best way to expose Republican hypocrisy and bigotry is by confronting them head-on.

That's exactly what I did earlier this week when Republicans voted to strip funding for LGBTQ-focused projects from a major appropriations bill.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66886105/417911647/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.22.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg2YjgzZi1iODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBJd6IFNZR2ZGO2YBy3_ZcnRmmVqwVNbI2EwITTd1D4=)
This wasn't their first attack on the LGBTQ community. Earlier this year, Republicans adopted an amendment to deny access to medically-necessary care to transgender veterans.

I'd had enough, Peter.

I reminded the committee about when I first ran for office as gay candidate. I got a letter in the mail with _‘dead f***ot’_ written on a picture of my face. I reminded them about when I left a gay bar and two people followed me with a baseball bat and beat me until I was bloodied and unconscious, because I’m gay.

This is what Republicans enable with their bigotry, and since they refuse to see it, I decided to show them.

**One of my colleagues on this committee who took these homophobic votes is Rep. Ken Calvert. He happens to represent Palm Springs -- home to one of our nation’s most vibrant LGBTQ communities.**

**[I'm hoping to send Calvert an unmistakable message that his actions won't go unchecked. So today, I'm asking you to send in a $3 contribution to support his Democratic opponent Will Rollins before his end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66886106/417911648/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.22.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg2YjgzZi1iODI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBJd6IFNZR2ZGO2YBy3_ZcnRmmVqwVNbI2EwITTd1D4=)**

clean_body: | = Hello Peter, this is Mark Pocan -- Member of Congress from Wisconsin’s 2nd District and co-chair of the Congressional LGBT Equality Caucus. Sometimes the best way to expose Republican hypocrisy and bigotry is by confronting them head-on. That's exactly what I did earlier this week when Republicans voted to strip funding for LGBTQ-focused projects from a major appropriations bill. = This wasn't their first attack on the LGBTQ community. Earlier this year, Republicans adopted an amendment to deny access to medically-necessary care to transgender veterans. I'd had enough, Peter. I reminded the committee about when I first ran for office as gay candidate. I got a letter in the mail with ‘dead f*ot’ written on a picture of my face. I reminded them about when I left a gay bar and two people followed me with a baseball bat and beat me until I was bloodied and unconscious, because I’m gay. This is what Republicans enable with their bigotry, and since they refuse to see it, I decided to show them. One of my colleagues on this committee who took these homophobic votes is Rep. Ken Calvert. He happens to represent Palm Springs -- home to one of our nation’s most vibrant LGBTQ communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Will is a gay Democrat and former federal prosecutor who won’t turn his back on his district for cheap political points. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: A little about me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=284%2E52803%2EVhHXAt)

| | Hi Peter, Angela Alsobrooks here! I know our team is growing every single day, so I’d like to take a moment to re-introduce myself and remind folks of what this campaign is all about! Here’s a little about me: I’m a 26-year public servant, former State’s Attorney, County Executive of Prince George’s County, and I’m running to become the next United States Senator from Maryland! I’m also a born-and-raised Marylander, mom to a soon-to-be college student, a Beyhive member, and a breakdancer! [**There’s more, but before I tell you all about why I decided to run, will you invest $15, $25, or whatever you can to help power my campaign for the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4266?t=10&amount=25&akid=284%2E52803%2EVhHXAt) | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4266?t=11&amount=25&akid=284%2E52803%2EVhHXAt)
---
Peter, I believe that our leaders should share the values and experiences of the people they represent.
I don’t live like or think like most Senators. I know what life is like for the average Marylander, because I’ve lived it. I see the challenges we face, and I know we can overcome them together.
That outlook is a family heirloom handed down to me by my great-grandmother, Maebel James – the strongest lady I’ve ever met. She was unflinching in the face of so much cruelty and injustice, and she had one rule for her family: **No complaining.**
**She’d tell all her grandkids and great-grandkids,_“If you don't like it, you go farther and you do better.”_**
The example set by my great-grandmother and by my parents led me to enter public service almost three decades ago.
I worked to modernize our criminal justice system, develop economic opportunities, protect the most vulnerable people in our communities, build prosperity for working families, and strengthen education.
We went farther and did better in this campaign for Senate – with your help, we set a state first-quarter fundraising record!
**I’m so, so proud of everything we’ve accomplished so far, and there’s plenty of work to do in the Senate. With a little determination and a good attitude, we’ll keep going farther and doing better for all Marylanders.**
[**Peter, if you can, will you chip in $25 to keep our historic campaign moving forward? I can’t tell you just how much I value your support.**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4266?t=12&amount=25&akid=284%2E52803%2EVhHXAt)
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4266?t=13&amount=25&akid=284%2E52803%2EVhHXAt)

Angela Alsobrooks

I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0Jgvb04fnH5MyyEMIyO23mnbu9k438Fq2OcjcwATJy5pTTbtO9Y75-8CIQJ1IajUbyZb-v_hRXpG7W8VaHMfGPkdxbazHYg9NnakwvXhb0R4Pw_bkD6z-BdMv9V6z_ZnwOdf7xpcLA8kSYXosC31f7I7w%3D%3D)

SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0JgyrtgmQsiw98kcZDcfzYhRx1E8hX_f4hmvXnK-UShEajatrkl-UBF5cf4IQrbiEa8l-7zKodVux1eoZJGKCAYOK8QLAMTmX1UU0W6OOj6-kr2Sef9W1fww296nMcIha0NS2f5oGicrpeeDT7Xd-SMmg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0Jgida2Omr-S8uSu_6duNZrICYh3rrK2LKyanKmWghxPhfkevPJNf7zmwfL2xvdf68qV7xfFfcl5b29BaC8P89Hktg2kjZ2hPhi_kKvhYnM4Zs_DlVHKMAAK74aksBjKsAC4VWAzIXm3KGFIRtAL9wQ_A%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0Jg1CBu4eJCrI2qVuMiioq1hXKKG9SNW14c5eK0D3DLbv1IsEG8b7SOEnDrj1DHtFFfSMS7rHz0h4W3ua1lTskm9g8w-epSIwWfOvJuBZpLGBniIjgqJshTRKCSYQExCL7Qs8Ffd4FICWIG0UIr1wb1Xg%3D%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0JgJfr2a6cnpKeQnwEQIzyjHvh4TUCNjOh99qQl1n7y8s7Fl3OIAsps4Kli1iK-zgMBODBwVM6L2QEGX-aIzw18reUnPdX6RBR1SVFzaHAT0q2MyTwdsVmE9AF0U3RlKnmdGlmXIzO59qEOO8MaF1Lj3Q%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f38fa19d33a84f40acc560e18e766de7&_e=TgFH2ImrVrMSM4IOxm4EMPAAOGMCjMpEgJlMNskKh8lL9zpYNP-iq9PJ_k3MU6wANoCa9LvVFw3sIfmuOnHx7_bHvIBRusUm7t_vgXOue9qXkF8OAkdknWuJKNw9uolzdJ8eQQOejkda2ttOc9_rZ0o_DkJGL2hOmSVVULCYrQ14HFEAJK684--rZT-RPhoi3WEvWg8kGROSD9IjAXWiF-gv_tNma5Neljfth2g6f3E3KCj1VysxIwHMgvr2D0JgYAq7A2eiA-GMA_KBXBdAyrvNNFtBt_8RM8M4Qh0GsTofr53nm2qYizPGFTcmw7TDLzZ4ZgZo7zRhAV4P7IkgklJsAPedlrvLxeqYd5Lfnd1C-oOTL9q8SrGgqITYTsmukuopTpH0KD9Ggok472UyyQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

subject: This is quite an elaborate scheme…

body:

It’s all hands on deck to protect Ohio’s democracy, so please make sure to vote by August 8! Thank you, Emilia Sykes HQ A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. name: Our Revolution
subject: ICYMI: The urgent abortion fight in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

There’s a fight to protect abortion that you need to know about in Ohio.

Right-wing special interests spent millions lobbying Ohio politicians to get a special election in the dead of summer to change Ohio election rules and block a ballot measure to restore abortion rights in November!

That’s why Our Revolution has jumped into rapid response mode with a crucial voter mobilization campaign to make sure Ohioans vote NO on August 8th to stop this attack on majority rule and reproductive healthcare.

This is urgent! Chip in today to help us organize Ohio voters. We’re up against the deep pockets of anti-abortion extremists and we can’t afford to lose this fight. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230722_FR_oh_0_3MO_ourrevolution_na_na_ohturnout&t=1008&akid=4478%2E5885482%2EIPuKhq)

Right now in Ohio, a doctor can be sent to jail for doing what’s best for the health of their patient. Recently a 10 year old rape victim had to travel out of state for abortion care, because there’s no exceptions even in cases of rape or incest.

The far right know they’ve overreached and that most Americans, and Ohioans, disapprove of their cruel agenda. So now they’re desperate to suppress the will of the people to get their way.

If it works in Ohio, we already know they’ll use this game plan state by state to allow minority rule to crush our rights.

Can we count on you to pitch in $5 or $10 so we can fund this critical voter mobilization to protect democracy and abortion access? It’s up to each of us to do what we can to make sure Ohio voters know what’s at stake. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230722_FR_oh_0_3MO_ourrevolution_na_na_ohturnout&t=1009&akid=4478%2E5885482%2EIPuKhq)

We knew this was the game plan after the terrible Dobbs decision last year in the Supreme Court. We have to make sure they see us and hear us at every turn.

Thank you.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Mark Warner
subject: I want to tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
let’s get personal for a moment

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66888249/417918476/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU0NTYyOS1jMDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=171p9R_pk1iLVLJy-bB7hcGQv6Yy2lHkIodGLGrwB7I=&emci=8e545629-c028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=90545629-c028-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Growing up, my family wasn’t really all that political. My dad was actually a Republican while my mom was an Independent. We didn’t sit around the dinner table in the evenings arguing about politics, that’s just not how it was. But somewhere along the line, I got bit by the politics bug. I have a vivid memory of being the Richard Nixon surrogate in my 8th grade class – yes I know, I’ve come a long way. I have my 8th grade history teacher, Jim Tyler, to thank for setting me on the path to being a Democrat. During the tumultuous year of 1968, it was my teacher who showed me the positive difference we can make for our country when government puts people first and we work together to make our country a better place. Fast forward to 2023 and I’m a proud Democrat in my third term as your United States Senator, and I’m feeling pretty darn grateful about it. But with that gratitude comes frustration as I witness an unthinkable amount of cynical partisanship and try to fight back against the chaos it causes. Issues that shouldn’t be politicized by the right often are, all for their party’s gain, and the American people bear the consequences. It’s in today’s political climate that I can’t help but think back to life with my parents as a kid. They always worked together to build a better life for my sister and I. It was watching their relationship that taught me the benefit of working with others, even those you might disagree with. In many ways I believe their relationship is what inspired my bipartisan approach in the Senate. **I’ll work with whoever I need to in order to get things done for Virginians and fight for our country’s values.** Case in point: Our historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Law that saw major job-creating investments in public transit and green infrastructure in Virginia. Or our Bipartisan Safer Communities Act that took a big step forward in our work to tackle the gun violence crisis. Progress is possible if we push past faux division and partisanship. Even in a divided Senate, I’m proud to get things done on a bipartisan basis. And I have my parents to thank for that mentality. But we need more politicians in Congress who will focus on delivering real results for the American people. Unfortunately right now, Republicans are far too concerned with dividing our country for the sake of remaining loyal to their party. That’s why while I’m not up for re-election, I’m on a mission to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who look past partisan gain. **_[Can you contribute anything you can to support my work to bring more leaders to Congress who are laser focused on addressing the issues that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66888250/417918477/2112403225?refcode=mw_em_230722_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU0NTYyOS1jMDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=171p9R_pk1iLVLJy-bB7hcGQv6Yy2lHkIodGLGrwB7I=)_** Thank you for taking the time, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66888251/417918478/2112403225?refcode=mw_em_230722_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDU0NTYyOS1jMDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=171p9R_pk1iLVLJy-bB7hcGQv6Yy2lHkIodGLGrwB7I=)********

The great Ronald Reagan once compared the spread of a tyrannical government to a silent fog, creeping up on our country in the dead of night.

Well, for DECADES, the Deep State, the radical Marxists, and the globalists special interests had been quietly seizing control of YOUR government.

clean_body: “Tyranny, like fog...”| | | | | Friend, The great Ronald Reagan once compared the spread of a tyrannical government to a silent fog, creeping up on our country in the dead of night. Well, for DECADES, the Deep State, the radical Marxists, and the globalists special interests had been quietly seizing control of YOUR government. And in 2016, we achieved what so many thought was impossible, we EXPOSED and DEFEATED the Swamp and restored power to YOU – the PEOPLE. But from that moment on, these crooks in Washington like Joe Biden decided that never again would they allow their grip on power to be threatened. And now, there is no line they will not cross, no low they will not stoop to, and no phony INDICTMENT they will not concoct to try and JAIL yours truly for LIFE as an innocent man. Make no mistake, Friend, the Left’s tyranny is no longer the approaching fog that President Reagan warned us of – it is HERE , and it is a venomous snake that has no intention of leaving. But while Crooked Joe and the radical Democrats believe that America is now theirs for the taking, they continue to underestimate the greatest political movement in HISTORY at every turn. Because while they might have a weaponized Justice Department, the entire fake news media, and the billionaire globalists on their side, WE have something far more powerful... ...More than 74 MILLION grassroots patriots who will NEVER,EVER bend the knee to tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
In the United States, our government should be by the people, for the people — not for corporations.
But because of dark money and broken campaign finance laws, corporate PACs are able to pour millions of dollars into key races around the country.
Kirsten will always put her constituents first. It’s why she runs a grassroots campaign, and doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs.
Her opponent, on the other hand, has no problem taking these big checks. Last year, as Big Pharma and fossil fuel companies poured money into his campaign, he outspent us 6:1.
Enough is enough.
We’re calling on Congress to ban corporate PAC money in political campaigns. Our elected officials should be fighting for their constituents, not for corporations. Will you join us by signing on now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DjNLX0gRXESQqNI_GjW2CA2]

clean_body: [] In the United States, our government should be by the people, for the people — not for corporations. But because of dark money and broken campaign finance laws, corporate PACs are able to pour millions of dollars into key races around the country. Kirsten will always put her constituents first. It’s why she runs a grassroots campaign, and doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs. Her opponent, on the other hand, has no problem taking these big checks. Last year, as Big Pharma and fossil fuel companies poured money into his campaign, he outspent us 6:1. Enough is enough. We’re calling on Congress to ban corporate PAC money in political campaigns. Our elected officials should be fighting for their constituents, not for corporations. Will you join us by signing on now? [] SIGN ON NOW [] SIGN ON NOW [] Thank you so much! — Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. Peter, Have you heard about Senator Katie Britt’s new book God Calls Us to Do Hard Things?

Katie reached out to us because she wants to make sure you get the chance to read and hear her story!

From a rural Wiregrass town to the University of Alabama to the United States Senate and beyond, Katie has a servant’s heart and experience overcoming challenges.
**[You’re going to want to read Katie’s story of perseverance, hard work, faith, and service. This is a book about the values and lessons that are foundational to the American Dream and our country’s survival.](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e296ccc15536403091c87d934dc4d906&_e=OkPiCBSQb90L9s96abWN2wU5KPX4BRKHrnPDWkBP0aqCckJcYgvM2ckYcAXWKztoNnwYgHjS7q2oDQEa0nDkUG5yHxuq1GivwclhDVA-wESlgsxjoIDIRMfuDLov9HqiPdJHvtvpVm_KKniF1HjLAO5ZBruAmLf4H7N0T6z2GueGNg92X6NzeDKjsR8DGVT_5_8LXsoCmH1CuiMTRN3-9PxaP78Nu3BIkBezeQ9rrq-9pDc9kppet29m9RuVdlpObPtuSblmkYVe9VNVm31snnnKsU0WSwHAonlpYQQ-A2a-nXL2K067Tu5NriqZ1VGHcmmChYPtpH1J0qWzuaiph-UpSa7H_DZmhMEKPuUdj_PBXpFU0jVj7B_J4aGtWDAk09w4X8dcynZXVtQ6eCiAFsrD4qJBI0CPdclVI5IUr-M%3D)

name: Tina Smith
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Call on Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville to stop blocking military promotions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I’ve had enough — I’m calling on Tommy Tuberville to stop using military promotions as a political bargaining chip. |
#
Folks — A Republican colleague of mine in the U.S. Senate is putting our national security at risk to advance his MAGA agenda. It’s despicable. Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. And if you’re wondering why the heck he’s doing this, **it’s because he’s protesting the Department of Defense’s abortion policy.** Right now, military personnel who are stationed in states where abortion is banned (like Alabama) may be reimbursed for travel expenses to receive abortions in other states. Apparently, Tommy Tuberville does not like giving servicemembers the right to make decisions about their health care — and as a result, he’s using partisan tactics to block military nominations. **This is an affront to our national security.** Seven previous secretaries of defense, who served under both Democratic and Republican presidents, have called on Tuberville to lift his blockade. Yet Tuberville persists, and his GOP colleagues remain quiet about his political publicity stunt impacting millions of our military personnel nationwide. **I’ve had enough — I’m calling on Tommy Tuberville to stop using military promotions as a political bargaining chip.[If you agree with me, add your name alongside mine in our efforts to get him to stand down and let the Senate vote on these critical military nominations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66895635/417925678/-970340525?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230722_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQ0ZjQyYy1jOTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZno1nCi1VgeW2JySitsJgubtQfQCNJaaU_KVkl7i4I=&emci=f544f42c-c928-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=fc44f42c-c928-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66895636/417925679/-970340525?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230722_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQ0ZjQyYy1jOTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZno1nCi1VgeW2JySitsJgubtQfQCNJaaU_KVkl7i4I=&emci=f544f42c-c928-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=fc44f42c-c928-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932)

| | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
---

**I stared death in the face and survived.** **_Friend, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson:_** Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I'm alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. clean_body: | = | | | | ---|--- In 1973, the Supreme Court made the constitutional right to an abortion the law of the land with the historic Roe v. Wade ruling. Wade. | ---|--- Thanks for your input, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: I will defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish.

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother
survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City.

He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked
for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats.

These claims were lies — all of them.

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos
told to get elected.

George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state,
and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including
money laundering and fraud.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1001&akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd ][IMG]

So, I've announced my intention to run for Congress to replace him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1002&akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd ]My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch
in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help me send George
Santos into political retirement?

CHIP IN →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1003&akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd ][IMG]

I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious
persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when
-- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place
where women had real rights and could determine their futures.

I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran
for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and
the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to
perform them.

Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican,
flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for
the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills
codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns.

Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people
of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing
about him.

Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and
pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our
values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1004&akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd ]But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m
asking: Will you split $25 between Charles Booker and my campaign to help
me defeat George Santos?

My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters
here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s
time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values

Let’s win this thing,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230722-3419-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3419_346206_DeCyKd&akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3419%2E346206%2EDeCyKd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

** TRUTH: There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. **
Fellow American,

I recently revealed my plans to shut down the administrative state, once and for all. In my effort to bring you the truth and a fully transparent plan, often in contrast with other insider politicians regurgitating talking points and false promises. **[It's time to offer a plan forward and for Republicans to change the conversation- from climatism and wokeism to what it means to be an American.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=0c6b75206eef42d4ac86832dc734814d&_e=JvtR2c6R4d8ySmxb83vuwRugW4a3jftiCCQH56rOQ0-lYQBBEKYx1J-pfgKnbPPstvCgiDmMb_B5POqmxM_8c0EiCjyHY5eCTmxplAsnHOzhmBFUmfRt37W8nmB_34fsQ3EyoExxKQTSsLqyX-ydvS9kLhhyQIiDj65CardMEdn_Y__OLazdms0pTueq2LgPuCPQ7cG1rVdcGEQVKZenilF2APUmdP20qR9eTBe_5eWKAirxKVNOwz7b1uOD1EZmfNnt3xpAZ2bDLWVIZrgLTkl7_szCvf14NQPQw9HCawbK4-s4EnPzHftAqynRt6TiGp7XZ2b_znRkWEAtOXUqPYz1RQ82p5Nq5FRvOmQuMqOViUcpaiJwD1Py-gxX1RQfgHhmEalYlA1El-IT6y9NU9lzrYSaQV488g0O-tHz1LI%3D) **

| [** END MANAGERIAL BUREAUCRACY -> **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=0c6b75206eef42d4ac86832dc734814d&_e=JvtR2c6R4d8ySmxb83vuwRugW4a3jftiCCQH56rOQ0-lYQBBEKYx1J-pfgKnbPPstvCgiDmMb_B5POqmxM_8c0EiCjyHY5eCTmxplAsnHOzhmBFUmfRt37W8nmB_34fsQ3EyoExxKQTSsLqyX-ydvS9kLhhyQIiDj65CardMEdn_Y__OLazdms0pTueq2LgPuCPQ7cG1rVdcGEQVKZenilF2APUmdP20qR9eTBe_5eWKAirxKVNOwz7b1uOD1EZm7cIkMi2Clxty7T--ArmWeaq3N471ZLf0ge8ViEt-X9wREPBRqXNOMNM5e1MlXEr0kBS9P5o1rTOOL_0vPP9IAVWSU0qQVEusXQIlXIzKn5sMWlYB9aJ_hYkOFRbgh1EHGEhJ3QRAVEsBvpU80F-7w3YKEKCnl6hBEPVRmFzC16o%3D)

How do we change the alphabet soup of Washington, Fellow American? How do we legitimately change the status quo and begin to make meaningful changes in America? How do we make the people we elect to run the government, actually run the government? Let me explain:

- | Dissolve the FBI into the US Secret Service, Defense Intelligence Agency, and Financial Crimes Enforcement Network | + | Eliminate redundant functions and improve bureaucracy from our national security. This would save taxpayers $1.4 billion per year.
---|---|---|---
- | Dissolve the Nuclear Regulatory Commission into the Dept. of Energy, Environmental Protection Agency, Dept. of Homeland Security, and FEMA | + | Increase energy competitiveness with China. China is rapidly expanding their nuclear energy infrastructure and we cannot get left behind. Additionally, would save taxpayers $600 million from the current proposed budget.
- | Dissolve the Department of Education into the Dept. of Labor, Dept. of State, and Dept. of Treasury | + | Afford states more ability to tailor education and improve options for school choice. Saves taxpayers $8 billion annually.

This is a 1776 moment. I am running without the need for permission or apologizing for the truth. The President of the United States is elected to run the executive branch of government and be a representative of "we the people." It's time to take that responsibility seriously.

The administrative state and the bureaucratic red tape in Washington has hindered everyone. From our elected officials attempting to make incremental changes over decades to every taxpayer in America that watches their taxes go into governmental waste.

Fellow American, America's revival begins on the back of making big changes. The deep state has been exposed, now it's time to actually fight it and make America's race to the top a reality. **[If you agree with this TRUTH- stand with me today!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=0c6b75206eef42d4ac86832dc734814d&_e=JvtR2c6R4d8ySmxb83vuwRugW4a3jftiCCQH56rOQ0-lYQBBEKYx1J-pfgKnbPPstvCgiDmMb_B5POqmxM_8c0EiCjyHY5eCTmxplAsnHOzhmBFUmfRt37W8nmB_34fsQ3EyoExxKQTSsLqyX-ydvS9kLhhyQIiDj65CardMEdn_Y__OLazdms0pTueq2LgPuCPQ7cG1rVdcGEQVKZenilF2APUmdP20qR9eTBe_5eWKAirxKVNOwz7b1uOD1EZmSIt1MK3D4ibfCfQSHgNhSX5ip7qCFMVvyIJjseGtfLm5w0RzK-PFnn-k1MUjQV-Qr6GAKxgtw3khJfgvmgiGbEobSBpcZz-3btjg4huwCewK5h9vNJCZYRpyu9eZ6QCtJSZWxZNLVhyp8pWSEpTZnggAKQBg4ZU79JOu_vaPqJE%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: What a real patriot looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Sam Brown is the real deal – and he needs your support.
Peter,

In my three decades of service in the Air Force, I learned what a real patriot looks like, and let me tell you: **My friend Sam Brown is a real patriot with an incredible story to tell.**

When he was serving in Afghanistan, Sam got caught in an IED explosion, leaving him with severe burns all over his body. It took three years for him to recover from his injuries, but he never quit and made a full recovery.

Peter, Sam knew from the moment he woke up from that terrible blast that **God let him survive for a reason.** He’s committed his life to serving others – [**and now he’s ready to deploy to Washington D.C. as Nevada’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af9c78304ac9421b88090515ca4d8049&_e=VpmAsCm3fNxbHhys7IzDvoqfif4ZREpApDiMejHvd1S1RS2mtvmZMC1clRGZmMUHPRwblfIngjsXT3Xu9LJKPu1Y1Paj57GRzjv1YyW1zjW14I9TKClGnoY7qitrDTpnK4vq-XNKfUAMbQlaMHafx4hscxHO43jr5YYj3JbFJ3XIPkekOv9axgYAFxieI8qaPkOeh5nj1GOsSX4NGh4sifQe9fx_YoXPOfOUK0NP0h7QNJ5clrDUsONwLha5l8n2xMYZ44BONfENC7TZ_DaBuKzgzkGIir8dKSs333QdvN9qt4ErG6_G2U3RSvjZkvXAJxW7QChO46XB459HC7e9QpyMyeRS4e9P-XUM7ti4YZZqkh9iEwd1LPEswvFjrllBHiKtymp478duREel8kJ5gI08vnp74pLnmpGTwIpouxggskVnxRUeeR9QPvBMSSjO)

Those of us who have been in the military know that our service doesn’t end once we take off the uniform.

Let me tell you, Peter. Sam Brown is the real deal. He’s a patriot and a public servant – and he’s ready to fight for all of us as a U.S. Senator.

[**Can you help me support Sam as he works to serve our country as a U.S. Senator?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=af9c78304ac9421b88090515ca4d8049&_e=VpmAsCm3fNxbHhys7IzDvoqfif4ZREpApDiMejHvd1S1RS2mtvmZMC1clRGZmMUHPRwblfIngjsXT3Xu9LJKPu1Y1Paj57GRzjv1YyW1zjW14I9TKClGnoY7qitrDTpnK4vq-XNKfUAMbQlaMHafx4hscxHO43jr5YYj3JbFJ3XIPkekOv9axgYAFxieI8qaPkOeh5nj1GOsSX4NGh4sifQe9fx_YoXPOfOUK0NP0h7QNJ5clrDUsONwLha5l8n2xMYZ44BONfENC7TZ_DaBuDWLo6llBzVBH5FIM5lo3tdJTH8Kay1H5Q_D15trW725qtAwsyt-Q09yntJzMk1tLc6fUcdyHT4nk4ijIP7ihchsAYcUGJbxupM9NHZR8fMGkFR9YF_Bh6nwbAd5pss4FCe6WHZCEPpZtC-527naF83rUK6sCQUAT-xyug92j-Tf)

clean_body: Sam Brown is the real deal – and he needs your support. Peter, In my three decades of service in the Air Force, I learned what a real patriot looks like, and let me tell you: My friend Sam Brown is a real patriot with an incredible story to tell. When he was serving in Afghanistan, Sam got caught in an IED explosion, leaving him with severe burns all over his body. It took three years for him to recover from his injuries, but he never quit and made a full recovery. Peter, Sam knew from the moment he woke up from that terrible blast that God let him survive for a reason. He’s committed his life to serving others – Those of us who have been in the military know that our service doesn’t end once we take off the uniform. Let me tell you, Peter. Sam Brown is the real deal. He’s a patriot and a public servant – and he’s ready to fight for all of us as a U.S. Senator. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. It’s been a little over six months since the radical right took control of the House Majority. And though Washington Republicans _claim_ to be working on behalf of the American people, we have the receipts: The past six months prove otherwise._Take a look >>_
**_Republicans have used their House Majority to:_**
❌ Pass extreme anti-abortion legislation

❌ Roll back climate protections

❌ ... and so much more.

name: Team Cori
subject: Cementing our right to abortions in the Constitution:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Sign now to call on Congress: Recognize the Equal Rights Amendment as the 28th Amendment to the Constitution without further delay. | |
---
Peter, On Friday, we marked 100 years since the Equal Rights Amendment was introduced to enshrine gender equality in the Constitution. Equality is overdue! **Cori Bush is re-energizing this 100-year struggle,** taking the work over the finish line in Congress to protect people seeking abortions, queer and transgender people, women of color, and other marginalized people. As a Black woman who has had an abortion and experienced domestic violence, sexual harassment in the workplace, unequal pay, and blatant gender discrimination, Cori knows the impact constitutional equality will have on millions of people across the country. [**Please sign now to call on Congress: Recognize the Equal Rights Amendment as the 28th Amendment to the Constitution without further delay. Peter,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f73e27f326d748cfab32cf2eafb4735a&_e=M57BuZc9zZIdxphGTnmOtKyORXVIwfVscyiuOzlHQ1W25oC5WX4PeTyGkiGRcuiPXbCpl7JBeY4sUy2J3-aRaqzAAg5K22crhd-A8LqEpmSI6H9IwNoezdDqN0OvojKYlSp8DuZHy2Vxd5YdIQuhAK1Fptq3ml7THmhFEdzPEYCEiX2-dNBHT_cOyad-W_CcgU5rq99ny-6y6ZzehljEvr570L_7LIA1kEBNCWw9kXVKVpv3-sEEasfDhkubzkt5Q6g2iAafgIC-dm_EKpQ4wMOV7GAAfUIohn51GOlP5FACVfaHNllHzVBLi6wGsroO587upx8qUgoGxhYVmBJVa_ZkVVzeVma3gaYmwYwytq_CCYubVytbujnPAlzsWQ6jfjvm_Bn623T8V8y7DBqiMA%3D%3D)

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f73e27f326d748cfab32cf2eafb4735a&_e=M57BuZc9zZIdxphGTnmOtKyORXVIwfVscyiuOzlHQ1W25oC5WX4PeTyGkiGRcuiPXbCpl7JBeY4sUy2J3-aRaqzAAg5K22crhd-A8LqEpmSI6H9IwNoezdDqN0OvojKYlSp8DuZHy2Vxd5YdIQuhAK1Fptq3ml7THmhFEdzPEYCEiX2-dNBHT_cOyad-W_CcgU5rq99ny-6y6ZzehljEvr570L_7LIA1kEBNCWw9kXVKVpv3-sEEasfDhkubzkt5Ws5LBhNXn2vldOYGO1lAvPwFb9eHbgpgH-9dxfQiP6kMpsL21BNFvgx9pemH4yO8Z_DGcm2-Qpd6psU44NIt4dkAhJJViIU-0T4iVao-Hv-xhri5h_GsU04wK6fm1HF1ChdCoKxWeuKeRZPtXGfekw%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington, Peter. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f73e27f326d748cfab32cf2eafb4735a&_e=M57BuZc9zZIdxphGTnmOtKyORXVIwfVscyiuOzlHQ1W25oC5WX4PeTyGkiGRcuiPXbCpl7JBeY4sUy2J3-aRaqzAAg5K22crhd-A8LqEpmSI6H9IwNoezdDqN0OvojKYlSp8DuZHy2Vxd5YdIQuhAK1Fptq3ml7THmhFEdzPEYCEiX2-dNBHT_cOyad-W_CcgU5rq99ny-6y6ZzehljEvr570L_7LIA1kEBNCWw9kXVKVpv3-sEEasfDhkubzkt52CKikrvszwjffvlsSd7DLzDUfSJ_ZiOD_PMWqNIPQKTRRscZOLcQLv9QVTsIt_TauwiXFp4S39ElV-pEuPB1Enq5okh8etVVVFlEXxmIJumnh6HTqm_ydMYbvrn7M9-rT1_4xI3HF0ili-SkdDuyGA%3D%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight, Peter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f73e27f326d748cfab32cf2eafb4735a&_e=M57BuZc9zZIdxphGTnmOtKyORXVIwfVscyiuOzlHQ1W25oC5WX4PeTyGkiGRcuiPXbCpl7JBeY4sUy2J3-aRaqzAAg5K22crhd-A8LqEpmSI6H9IwNoezdDqN0OvojKYlSp8DuZHy2Vxd5YdIQuhAK1Fptq3ml7THmhFEdzPEYCEiX2-dNBHT_cOyad-W_CcgU5rq99ny-6y6ZzehljEvr570L_7LIA1kEBNCWw9kXVKVpv3-sEEasfDhkubzkt5B88FmzVmU6Xx2k73dAJEEHNz4_24qSTXkacb8OZwIdaXajyojpSvF-DBCyIItd-yUG3jePxeVZLLoKKhHVjfVSZ7lbKJEc-KhFIzZmGTd88nLcK-Xgpa44f1mSP2UhWl-TbLm_XKa3bE2dj5Znqa7A%3D%3D)

Tim Sheehy

clean_body: I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator. | | Peter, I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

– _WHAS11_
---
Peter: Under Andy's leadership, Kentucky's economy is booming.

The Commonwealth reported its third consecutive year with a budget surplus of over $1 billion — **the three largest budget surpluses in Kentucky history!** And the growing economy is attracting more and more businesses to set up shop here in Kentucky.

What does that mean for Kentuckians? **More jobs, higher wages, better opportunities.**
**Andy:_“We continue to see an economy that is on fire, all while we have lowered income and property taxes for our families.”_**

| Friend, As I'm sure you've heard by now, Governor Chris Sununu announced this past week that he will not be seeking another term in New Hampshire's corner office. Governor Sununu's tenure has been marked by effective governance, thoughtful decision making and a deep sense of responsibility to the people of New Hampshire. He will be greatly missed! Now, with an open Governor's seat looming, protecting the GOP majority in the State Senate is critical to defending Governor Sununu's legacy. **Democrats are already promising to try and undo all of our successes such as the tax cuts, improvements in education and school choice, and empowering families with more opportunities for their children. ** [Help us defend Governor Sununu's successful legacy](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjY0Nzc1MDA1MTM5MTEzOTAzJmM9dTNqNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMTc3Njg2NjI3JmQ9ZzdzMnExeA==.NHoWxQMbvD56BnX2pSZSR0Yr1uSjEKw_ktKDtGr0nlY)****
The 2024 campaign season will look much different without Governor Sununu at the top of the ballot, but **we are confident that any of the numerous Republican candidates that have already stepped up will help us win up and down the ticket! ** [Will you consider pledging $25, $50 or even $100 to help ensure a strong Republican victory in 2024?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjY0Nzc1MDA1MTM5MTEzOTAzJmM9dTNqNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMTc3Njg2NjM1JmQ9ejNvOXIzdw==.C98UP4qvbp3ka1cYfQCbAUgfyPzbmIejzFtXKdgdVBs) ****Thank you,

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Protect the 89 remaining Yellowstone gray wolves from brutal hunting
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891003?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Wolves are being viciously slaughtered _RIGHT NOW, Friend_ \-- including harmless wolf pups who are just trying to make it through their very first winter. Hungry wolves **lured out** of their dens by bait. **Shot to shreds** by piercing bullets. **Mangled limbs** torn apart by leg traps. **Gasping for air** while being CHOKED TO DEATH by neck snares. Running scared for their lives while being **chased down by helicopters.** Bulldozed and **run over** by snowmobiles. Even nursing wolf mamas and their baby pups are being **blown up by DYNAMITE** inside their dens. __**And it’s ALL completely legal.**__ Ruthless prize hunters are wiping out vulnerable wolf populations, showing _NO MERCY_ when it comes to _brutally slaughtering_ these beloved canines. We are on the verge of losing one of North America’s most iconic animals -- **and unless we ACT NOW to STOP these inhumane killings, more and more wolves will suffer unimaginable deaths.** [**Please, Friend, these defenseless wolves don’t stand a chance without us giving them a voice. Add your name now to help SAVE innocent wolves from being violently murdered! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891004?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891005?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Northern Rockies states bordering Yellowstone National Park have __**NO LAWS**__ to keep gray wolves safe, legally permitting trophy hunters to indiscriminately MASSACRE these precious creatures.
Just last year, trophy hunters on a violent rampage took out **25 gray wolves,** _**ELIMINATING THE ENTIRE PACK.**_ Now, there are _only 89 gray wolves_ remaining in Yellowstone.
While several other states have implemented safeguards to try and preserve this fragile species, the Biden Administration has **FILED AN APPEAL to REMOVE** these critical gray wolf protections -- which could push this treasured animal closer to __**EXTINCTION.**__ Wolves are counting on us to fight for them right now, Friend. [**Will you sign our petition to DEMAND that the Biden Administration uphold and secure protections for gray wolves before it’s too late for these beloved canines?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891006?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891007?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting wolves,
Friends of the Earth**
|

**Friend, today I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign for Congress.**

[**Early support will make-or-break my campaign, so will you take a quick moment to add your signature? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902003/417935764/-947448803?refcode=JRFC_20230722_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZTI0YmMtZDgyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cbft1H6kNIXgzNmCrRYHlzJ74V_UyezrMNOE_SNl-Fw=&emci=c91be55f-ff27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=69de24bc-d828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1770913) | [500 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR SIGNATURE TO ENDORSE JIRAIR RATEVOSIAN FOR CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902004/417935765/-947448803?refcode=JRFC_20230722_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZTI0YmMtZDgyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cbft1H6kNIXgzNmCrRYHlzJ74V_UyezrMNOE_SNl-Fw=&emci=c91be55f-ff27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=69de24bc-d828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1770913)
---
**I’m running for Congress because representation matters and there is so much at stake to ensure everyone has a fair shot to chase their own dream.**

I’ve dedicated my life to helping others: as a grassroots organizer, as one of President Biden’s appointments to the State Department, and as a public health doctor. And now, I am fighting for a better, prosperous, more equal Los Angeles.

I want to take my experience making Washington work better to tackle the root causes of homelessness, eliminate HIV infections in California and bring green union jobs to our state.

I want to take my experience working with Republicans to support a roadmap to citizenship, a fairer tax code, more pay for teachers and health care providers, and champion small businesses because they are the heartbeat of our towns and cities.

And I want to take my experiences working with foreign governments to continue the legacy of Congressman Adam Schiff in his _dogged_ and _relentless_ pursuit of democracy.

[**That’s why I’m fighting to bring generational change to Congress, ensure everyone has a fair shot to chase their dreams, and stop the GOP in its tracks – but I can’t do this without you. Please, add your signature before tonight’s deadline to endorse my campaign »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902005/417935766/-947448803?refcode=JRFC_20230722_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZTI0YmMtZDgyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cbft1H6kNIXgzNmCrRYHlzJ74V_UyezrMNOE_SNl-Fw=&emci=c91be55f-ff27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=69de24bc-d828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1770913)
[500 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR SIGNATURE TO ENDORSE JIRAIR RATEVOSIAN FOR CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902006/417935767/-947448803?refcode=JRFC_20230722_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZTI0YmMtZDgyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cbft1H6kNIXgzNmCrRYHlzJ74V_UyezrMNOE_SNl-Fw=&emci=c91be55f-ff27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=69de24bc-d828-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1770913)

clean_body: | = Friend, today I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign for Congress. | I’m running for Congress because representation matters and there is so much at stake to ensure everyone has a fair shot to chase their own dream. I’ve dedicated my life to helping others: as a grassroots organizer, as one of President Biden’s appointments to the State Department, and as a public health doctor. And now, I am fighting for a better, prosperous, more equal Los Angeles. I want to take my experience making Washington work better to tackle the root causes of homelessness, eliminate HIV infections in California and bring green union jobs to our state. I want to take my experience working with Republicans to support a roadmap to citizenship, a fairer tax code, more pay for teachers and health care providers, and champion small businesses because they are the heartbeat of our towns and cities. And I want to take my experiences working with foreign governments to continue the legacy of Congressman Adam Schiff in his dogged and relentless pursuit of democracy. I’m so grateful for your support, Jirair Ratevosian | | Paid for by Jirair Ratevosian For Congress 321 N. Pass Ave., Box 133, Burbank, CA 91505 www.jirairforca.com Please, consider making a =. But if I’m going to make it to Washington and defeat an establishment Democrat who is nothing but a rubber stamp for Joe Biden, then I have to do everything in my power to rally patriotic Americans across the country to win! Fellow Conservative, my name is Sam Brown. That’s me in the pictures.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: what I said on Morning Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I will not stand for one man’s political games.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902289/417936706/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230722-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFkYWI0M2QtZGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dttUQb2yol-RZzbTOPvAqarspAF6doOBHHs8FO4jI3s=)
---
| Peter,

Earlier this month, I went on Morning Joe to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power.

He is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions are going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902290/417936709/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230722-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFkYWI0M2QtZGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dttUQb2yol-RZzbTOPvAqarspAF6doOBHHs8FO4jI3s=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902292/417936710/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230722-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFkYWI0M2QtZGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dttUQb2yol-RZzbTOPvAqarspAF6doOBHHs8FO4jI3s=)
---
**_As the representative for Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers across Virginia’s 7th District, I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness. And I’ll keep calling out the disrespect to our servicemembers and the danger to our national security inherent in his actions._**

[_**Thank you for your continued support for my campaign and my efforts to stand up for our military and stand up against the actions of a dangerously incompetent senator.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902293/417936711/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230722-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFkYWI0M2QtZGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dttUQb2yol-RZzbTOPvAqarspAF6doOBHHs8FO4jI3s=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902294/417936712/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230722-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFkYWI0M2QtZGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dttUQb2yol-RZzbTOPvAqarspAF6doOBHHs8FO4jI3s=)

I appreciate your support,

clean_body: I will not stand for one man’s political games. | = | Peter, Earlier this month, I went on Morning Joe to discuss Senate Republican Tommy Tuberville’s egregious abuse of power. He is single-handedly stopping the promotion of more than 200 military servicemembers — and vital military leadership positions are going unfilled because of his performative and dangerous antics. = | = As the representative for Marine Corps Base Quantico and thousands of servicemembers across Virginia’s 7th District, I will not stand for one man’s political games interfering with our military readiness. And I’ll keep calling out the disrespect to our servicemembers and the danger to our national security inherent in his actions. = | = I appreciate your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Major announcement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
The rematch is on. Don’t sit this one out.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66902473/417937612/-1632984841?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230722_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGQzNzY1OS1kZDI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d00A1C8seG-LlRfGxEkZP_PzQTkSmZQCxbDIzHDNXZY=) **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $3 donation between Will’s campaign and Mark Takano to help him launch with strength?
