| | Friend,

---
At a time when the Biden Department of Justice is trying to JAIL ME FOR LIFE, disloyal Republicans – or RINOs as we like to call them – are contriving a $370 MILLION PLOT to try and sabotage us in the primary.

---
**_It’s during moments of crisis that you learn who your true allies are – and who would gladly stab you in the back. . . _**_
_
---
The harsh truth is that these RINO special interest donors don’t actually care if Biden gets 4 more years in the White House.

---
_The ONLY thing they fear is a president who puts the AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST._

---
And that makes _me_ their public enemy number one.

---
If they were true supporters of our America First principles, then they’d take that $370 MILLION and put it toward building a state-of-the-art vote gathering operation that would completely SWAMP the Democrats’ ballot harvesting and cheating schemes.

---
**That’s why our campaign is filling the void to build that massive operation so that we can be 100% prepared to FIRE Crooked Joe _the second_ I’m declared the nominee.**

---
_While the cowards who would stab me in the back have recently been exposed, I do know that I have 74 MILLION courageous allies who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny._

---
_Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs._

---
**[Please make a contribution of $1 to our Primary Victory Fund so that we can wrap up the primary as quickly as possible and focus all of our efforts on the REAL battle of firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House – for 1,500% impact.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=bd65f8c0648d48b3a45bf42979f01ec2&_e=K0b7rSy5sLfFGNQWU1OQkJUHIhv5y68zb9pLevuizZZtXxDmghnYwlD_dXWZTv-0DFpWifakpavpNMflLuPQcOn5h53YOz4bJ3BB6BYk2Q6zd1kjagxZAM4SUHso46ZAkifzx-WztgfYpRnz7quWoUT0JHbLqrlJpq9Ge7xhQU24qFI64vns9BfQYn7HDGxIGwYC15yR62G1PzzeYXcv_WpnjQ6mJPQlZEVg7X_6t5Vlvs7spErpMI9NG7EW5W_j44P5_9vpVR4vIAXnqyGaOifzy9vZHFpTpE7rK7tATEbycsqL0Fs95iw9X1G7P3p8wPIdle3qDCQffn9Yu23GzddmbD6boP28avRkMG84WtZzETTfOwBPDNoekIrhcmZrvnHk64VpQQjAR_2r403JaSJT8DHcnWSxh517YbgrDUAdVRJxtbtjV3phRp2N4S6zjKV6unX3dj9BWviTvAvT-nyAnMOywD_cZgAlznhMMWH_UkcpVhoUfwpsYpXOsaNO)**

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Friend, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=bd65f8c0648d48b3a45bf42979f01ec2&_t=VGxb1ws229gjiSdu1vSVVdyv4Gk5gjOwTzgYW-CVCuq82GcUHwmPA0-HwH96Ln-8Q0qzrHoegA1Oc2784hAVk0Ieuu08nA80cVEGaDCm3cs%3D)

It’s during moments of crisis that you learn who your true allies are – and who would gladly stab you in the back. . . The harsh truth is that these RINO special interest donors don’t actually care if Biden gets 4 more years in the White House. The ONLY thing they fear is a president who puts the AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST. And that makes me their public enemy number one. If they were true supporters of our America First principles, then they’d take that $370 MILLION and put it toward building a state-of-the-art vote gathering operation that would completely SWAMP the Democrats’ ballot harvesting and cheating schemes. That’s why our campaign is filling the void to build that massive operation so that we can be 100% prepared to FIRE Crooked Joe the second I’m declared the nominee. While the cowards who would stab me in the back have recently been exposed, I do know that I have 74 MILLION courageous allies who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny. * ["New York is full" proclaims sanctuary city Mayor Eric Adams.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afiklk-trhiujldw-o/)

### **Blatant disregard for the rule of law**
[The Biden administration is suing Texas for their attempts to **secure their own border**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afiklk-trhiujldw-c/) Take a minute and let that sink in...

[Congress is attempting to pass a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afiklk-trhiujldw-q/) Why in the world would anyone believe that Congress could come up with **ANY** ethical standards?! **Censorship and the government** While Robert Kennedy, Jr. began to testify on the government's attack on free speech the liberals [**immediately** attempted to censor his comments](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-afiklk-trhiujldw-a/) \- while claiming no censorship exists. name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: What a real patriot looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Sam Brown is the real deal – and he needs your support.
Fellow American,

In my three decades of service in the Air Force, I learned what a real patriot looks like, and let me tell you: **My friend Sam Brown is a real patriot with an incredible story to tell.**

When he was serving in Afghanistan, Sam got caught in an IED explosion, leaving him with severe burns all over his body. It took three years for him to recover from his injuries, but he never quit and made a full recovery.

Fellow American, Sam knew from the moment he woke up from that terrible blast that **God let him survive for a reason.** He’s committed his life to serving others – [**and now he’s ready to deploy to Washington D.C. as Nevada’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ed6f12aff13b417287a7ac0c2aec49c0&_e=-3Ep47CxtqtoHcPzJ6SdGMqG7kSEwctPkq--1rkNLC2IeK5RR1Lh1X6Yxv7Ts7iDAorpcl5FUt5gP0DSPX8mfKL4N0Kjep-TVhn1UfF5AVJGdCCZUSKnI8ha-x0gjWSSn9MjGZ5dIh6YvQhSHEuDo3RU4K7itE831bNt9j9CHT3MRDKhhzUxBw2c9hAx4wQOv8MSNutJWJXIzxnKxxSbve5M7ncl-bivaSVg5qdUHRdBWrOoaIflM7i1hyRCrI6Zmq7-cDCB6z_yJB4hAPl2mwhyL07Q9VrPZB4K5WTw2jzQ6zlbBWIxOxnVoazBdq43HN1yVonMFujht39X0qu12OiOlj1ciHCQ2tGIlfqpljZf7tICdP32dHWfK-jQHY7R0fk_aEc3DrTIw16C6n8gUhptCHcmbsz8jjYW7qiBMJVLf453jppimtIxkX3QN06r)

Those of us who have been in the military know that our service doesn’t end once we take off the uniform.

Let me tell you, Fellow American. Sam Brown is the real deal. He’s a patriot and a public servant – and he’s ready to fight for all of us as a U.S. Senator.

[**Can you help me support Sam as he works to serve our country as a U.S. Senator?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ed6f12aff13b417287a7ac0c2aec49c0&_e=-3Ep47CxtqtoHcPzJ6SdGMqG7kSEwctPkq--1rkNLC2IeK5RR1Lh1X6Yxv7Ts7iDAorpcl5FUt5gP0DSPX8mfKL4N0Kjep-TVhn1UfF5AVJGdCCZUSKnI8ha-x0gjWSSn9MjGZ5dIh6YvQhSHEuDo3RU4K7itE831bNt9j9CHT3MRDKhhzUxBw2c9hAx4wQOv8MSNutJWJXIzxnKxxSbve5M7ncl-bivaSVg5qdUHRdBWrOoaIflM7i1hyRCrI6Zmq7-cDCB6z_yJB4hAPl2mwhyL07Q9VrPZB4K5WTw2jxAvDJE0D3rcwVWgGJinQ0GccP7HeNk1J_qZg-Vefo_Bk2i9MHtGVs4L2kRJAvrhDeB3am_f5bcPkNOEprE6jfKkO9d9o5YgmR70a6_LuPv5Jr8HS4tvr0Mt02fNrt5m_AfDVGcW6UQZ3RoRjCkGEDK)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ed6f12aff13b417287a7ac0c2aec49c0&_e=-3Ep47CxtqtoHcPzJ6SdGMqG7kSEwctPkq--1rkNLC2IeK5RR1Lh1X6Yxv7Ts7iDAorpcl5FUt5gP0DSPX8mfKL4N0Kjep-TVhn1UfF5AVJGdCCZUSKnI8ha-x0gjWSSn9MjGZ5dIh6YvQhSHEuDo3RU4K7itE831bNt9j9CHT3MRDKhhzUxBw2c9hAx4wQOv8MSNutJWJXIzxnKxxSbve5M7ncl-bivaSVg5qdUHRdBWrOoaIflM7i1hyRCrI6Zmq7-cDCB6z_yJB4hAPl2mwhyL07Q9VrPZB4K5WTw2jyizNi8WmVQ7KUCtcRSJxfSu5232NA5X9A8tTeZCTl4m5O3rPnUZaafcDL6A0ne-_al4UuL-uD2Wgb4e0SOJh146zW1gA2Z6-yUrwbPu_b6RtdwoH6yWJ6_VjGuoBSOHWvJH46QketJOeCxz12yHZ2H)
U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham

[**SUPPORT SAM NOW >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ed6f12aff13b417287a7ac0c2aec49c0&_e=-3Ep47CxtqtoHcPzJ6SdGMqG7kSEwctPkq--1rkNLC2IeK5RR1Lh1X6Yxv7Ts7iDAorpcl5FUt5gP0DSPX8mfKL4N0Kjep-TVhn1UfF5AVJGdCCZUSKnI8ha-x0gjWSSn9MjGZ5dIh6YvQhSHEuDo3RU4K7itE831bNt9j9CHT3MRDKhhzUxBw2c9hAx4wQOv8MSNutJWJXIzxnKxxSbve5M7ncl-bivaSVg5qdUHRdBWrOoaIflM7i1hyRCrI6Zmq7-cDCB6z_yJB4hAPl2mwhyL07Q9VrPZB4K5WTw2jxi1nkmWN97BQEu_ye1LT7OHU4kODawY7tmqLJTKJ0f8NiSugs0lzeLeXTJuTlKm2br3JbxI2ORUMLUsZd5hETFcQZT5fLKFHlYPfzUn6DYRh-xr9kstZsjC_VTRdUIXF93ZRtFhjFUBaHX1AfXa5qB)

If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. [T&C/Privacy Policy.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ed6f12aff13b417287a7ac0c2aec49c0&_e=-3Ep47CxtqtoHcPzJ6SdGNaVfuIsZjoVYqaKOv0lZ403-Y9XgzQ5-u07CRbpArijZXpUI9NBvZA75gXBpeCG1ZrsvAUCgCzMEXqU67-Djme64Et6TkS1kUNc6w8de6jT6BY_koYTxocLMtfQBfnrWgX3-HdFZAaQrHk_E4n2bjV9TLVzMHyBh-FNUqR3A3-FuU9CBvZBqLsGjV08REkrR5JUosyH4I5dvc2eJwMvR0vJk9Vfl8gfRPdR1of7SWki)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: FEAR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...

As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...
| | Friend,
---
After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about...
**_... FEAR. _**
The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for _LIFE_ for your beliefs.
The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.
And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target.
Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts.
But the truth is, they _do_ bother me - _not because I 'm worried about my own fate, **but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. **_
Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers.
And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
_But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... _

clean_body: As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall... As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall... | | Friend, After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about... ... FEAR. The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for LIFE for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1. And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target. Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts. But the truth is, they do bother me - not because I 'm worried about my own fate, but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers. And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... ... No, OUR MAGA Movement is more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots who REFUSE to even flinch in the face of tyranny! Which is why at this pivotal moment for our nation - and with a THIRD unjust indictment now looming - I ask that you help me PROVE just how UNBREAKABLE we truly are. | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Fri, Jun 9, 2023 Subject: Re: My Indictment | Friend, Let me make something abundantly clear... What the radical Left and the Deep State are doing - this backwards INDICTMENT - is not about truth or justice. It 's about FEAR. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1. Because the America we once knew and loved is now gone. It has been transformed into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship where the Democrats have gained complete control through the weaponization of our justice system. But even during these darkest times, my resolve to save America does not waiver. I will never give up, and I will never end this campaign. Because YOU - the countless patriots who refuse to even flinch in the face of tyranny - are my hope, my courage, and my strength to NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. And that UNBREAKABLE resolve is something these sick and twisted radicals will never understand. Which is why despite all their vicious attacks, their lies, and their witch hunts, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024! | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Katie Porter
subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
You can read the thread below.
Hi Derek, it’s Katie Porter.
Lacey, our Campaign Manager, asked me to reach out about our fundraising (see the thread below). We’re falling short right now—**can you make a donation of $5 today to help us close the gap?**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230722-2](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230722-2?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&refcode2=26936_3422442_otZBd_&akid=26936%2E3422442%2EotZBd_)**
Our campaign’s fundraising is operating in a way that is unique, and that’s because I’m not just another career politician in Washington. I’m a single mom who ran for office when Trump came to power—and I’m here to shake up the status quo, hold corporations accountable, and deliver for working people.
If you’re with me, please make a donation of $5—or whatever you can afford—at this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230722-2**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230722-2?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&refcode2=26936_3422442_otZBd_&akid=26936%2E3422442%2EotZBd_)
Thank you for your support!
—Katie
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter (iPhone)
Date: Sat, July 22, 2023
Subject: fundraising numbers
To: Lacey Morrison_
On it!
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Lacey Morrison
Date: Sat, July 22, 2023
Subject: fundraising numbers
To: Katie Porter (iPhone)_
Can you send an email to our supporters and see if they can chip in just $5 before midnight?
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter (iPhone)
Date: Sat, July 22, 2023
Subject: fundraising numbers
To: Lacey Morrison_
We still have time. How can I help boost our fundraising so we can get back on track?

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Lacey Morrison
Date: Sat, July 22, 2023
Subject: fundraising numbers
To: Katie Porter (iPhone)_
Hey Katie,
Our grassroots donors have really stepped up this month, but we’re still falling short of where we need to be by $109,350. It sucks that our opponents have raised so much money from lobbyists and corporations. We may have to talk about holding off on TV ads...
—lacey
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter (iPhone)
Date: Sat, July 22, 2023
Subject: fundraising numbers
To: Lacey Morrison_
Lacey–How are our fundraising numbers looking for July?
—Katie
Sent from my iPhone

subject: NEW Episode of Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast feat. Tara Rodas!
body: Tara Rodas was a federal employee for more than 20 years. While serving at the Pomona Fairplex Emergency Intake Site in Pomona, California, Tara volunteered to help place Unaccompanied Children with Sponsors in the United States. [Action] CHRIS FARRELL'S ON WATCH PODCAST US Govt Child Trafficking -- Whistleblower Tara Rodas Exposes the Evil [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64281&L=29904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1yNnFUOHJqRVNyOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6d743df2a3fc9f1325013f18ddc9047467d3cd39759f3204d4166c20ae67536a] Tara Rodas was a federal employee for more than 20 years. While serving at the Pomona Fairplex Emergency Intake Site in Pomona, California, Tara volunteered to help place Unaccompanied Children with Sponsors in the United States. Tara saw, firsthand, how lack of transparency, lack of oversight, flawed policies, and deficiencies in HHS’ Unaccompanied Children Program resulted in children being placed with suspicious Sponsors and suspected trafficking rings throughout the United States. subject: $7 for 7 special elections >>
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 today to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4s0u4U9o01sljM_uw6ovAEqcUdw7AmpUuFq9HpiYiRT1ouvhB-pWRzTxD9Jap-icRIfVhpdf1RMEbdCkAOtQjbaN7JhP3DHfkOm9g7v0RKj1MZD_E1Wwc3946YCTJb-SYCK7ZOgbR_r_p2Z9GCs11p338HKi4tCOQfdehHefs6kHDuE2PSJDyq8LlSDV5aqSX_hlQK4MjnFpophZgkeYFT4tBoK0Hr7hGKMsw6Jj9dbPXd4_mRE8Seeh0Eji7-gYvGwe70oQdJwLFLRHaM6oRNWtxe-NA9V1xwmlffP1JbD1x5Ho5bMm__sdCZ2-fwJuqhPkjz1xPkt9h6FJ0mOLtrPSuNmJajUMHhmKizoRm2ET0F_tj1j8DWsUUXDfO5i46c_3Vf9SczTn0tkHBvkHfkfgTnpW7KRmeO7bPOq-ukrjdMeDTmPbM7F6mMZrjBr2UVJdJw41xRs1pM9HIIf02hO0dN5K9z75xjrTKsJHp2nWqChrCRRl_gJE5UV-uvHbL2r04-Rw_EOTz0_h19Wm_Cw/3y3/VBooZ-b3RlmLRx1JidjslA/h0/bCBZ_aSsIsbt-PKfPWb74Tab2lrLZxLb-NgtxgxIwoE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | | | | $7. That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: Reason #1: We have seven special elections on the horizon in critical states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. Reason #2: We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. Reason #3: Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | $7 donations are exactly what we need to continue winning special elections and loosening the GOP’s grip on state legislatures.
